The company needs to manage permissions for the employees so that the permissions are appropriate for the job responsibilities. Which IAM resource should the company use to meet this requirement with the LEAST operational overhead?
comments: IAM user groups allow you to group users with similar job roles or responsibilities together. Instead of managing individual user permissions, you can assign IAM policies to these groups. When an employee changes teams or job roles, you can simply add or remove them from relevant user groups, and the permissions associated with the group will be applied automatically to the user.

IAM user groups can help manage permissions for users with similar responsibilities. However, as employees change teams and job roles, the need to constantly update group memberships can create operational overhead.

IAM roles are the most suitable resource for managing permissions in a scenario where employees frequently change teams and have different job roles and responsibilities. IAM roles allow you to define a set of permissions and policies and then assign those roles to users or AWS services as needed. This way, you can grant temporary access based on the user's current job responsibilities, and the users do not have to be directly assigned specific permissions. IAM user groups (option A) are typically used to simplify the management of permissions for sets of users who share common job responsibilities. However, roles provide more flexibility in dynamic scenarios where users move between teams.
IAM 用户组允许您将具有相似工作角色或职责的用户分组。您无需管理单个用户的权限，而是可以将 IAM 策 略分配给这些用户组。当员工更换团队或工作角色时，您只需将其添加到相应的用户组或从中移除，与该用户组关联的 权限将自动应用到该用户。
IAM 用户组可以帮助管理职责相似的用户的权限。但是，随着员工更换团队和职位，需要不断更新组成员 关系，这会增加运营成本。

cn_question: 企业可以使用哪项 AWS 服务来安全地存储和加密数据库密码？
en_question: Which AWS service can a company use to securely store and encrypt passwords for a database?
comments: AWS Secrets Manager : Enables you to easily rotate, manage, and retrieve database credentials, API keys, and other secrets throughout their lifecycle.

B. AWS Secrets Manager. AWS Secrets Manager is a service specifically designed for securely storing, retrieving, and managing sensitive information such as database credentials, API keys, and other secrets. It provides built-in encryption and integrates with AWS IAM for fine-grained access control. This makes it a suitable choice for securely managing passwords for a database.
AWS Secrets Manager：使您能够轻松地在数据库凭证、API 密钥和其他密钥的整个生命周期内进行轮换、 管理和检索。
B. AWS Secrets Manager。AWS Secrets Manager 是一项专为安全存储、检索和管理敏感信息（例如数据 库凭证、API 密钥和其他机密信息）而设计的服务。它提供内置加密功能，并与 AWS IAM 集成，可实现细粒度的访问 控制。因此，它是安全管理数据库密码的理想选择。

cn_question: 云从业人员可以使用哪些工具来检索 AWS 安全和合规性文档，并将其作为证据提交给审计员或监管机构？

comments: C. AWS Artifact. AWS Artifact is a portal that provides access to AWS security and compliance documents, including reports and certifications. It offers a central location for retrieving various documents, such as SOC reports, PCI DSS reports, and other compliance-related materials. These documents can then be submitted as evidence to auditors or regulators to demonstrate compliance with relevant standards and regulations.
C. AWS Artifact。AWS Artifact 是一个门户，提供对 AWS 安全和合规性文档（包括报告和认证）的访问。 它提供了一个集中位置，用于检索各种文档，例如 SOC 报告、PCI DSS 报告和其他合规性相关材料。这些文档可以作 为证据提交给审计人员或监管机构，以证明符合相关标准和法规。

cn_question: 亚马逊S3中可以使用哪些加密类型来保护静态对象？（选择两种。）

cn_options.A: 使用 Amazon S3 管理的加密密钥进行服务器端加密 (SSE-S3)
cn_options.B: 使用 AWS KMS 管理密钥的服务器端加密 (SSE-KMS)

en_question: Which encryption types can be used to protect objects at rest in Amazon S3? (Choose two.)

en_options.A: Server-side encryption with Amazon S3 managed encryption keys (SSE-S3)
en_options.B: Server-side encryption with AWS KMS managed keys (SSE-KMS)

comments: The correct answers are: A. Server-side encryption with Amazon S3 managed encryption keys (SSE-S3) ✅ B. Server-side encryption with AWS KMS managed keys (SSE-KMS) ✅ Reasoning: SSE-S3 uses keys managed by Amazon S3 to encrypt your data at rest. SSE-KMS integrates with AWS Key Management Service (KMS) for more control over encryption keys, including key rotation and access policies. TLS and SSL are used for data in transit, not at rest. Transparent Data Encryption (TDE) is used with databases like Amazon RDS for Oracle or SQL Server, not for S3 objects. Confidence level: High Reference: AWS S3 Encryption Documentation

A. Server-side encryption with Amazon S3 managed encryption keys (SSE-S3) All Amazon S3 buckets have encryption configured by default, and all new objects that are uploaded to an S3  bucket are automatically encrypted at rest. Server-side encryption with Amazon S3 managed keys (SSE-S3) is the default encryption configuration for every bucket in Amazon S3. E. Transparent Data Encryption (TDE) is a technology used to encrypt entire databases at rest, including data and log files, to protect against unauthorized access to sensitive data.

The encryption types that can be used to protect objects at rest in Amazon S3 are: A. Server-side encryption with Amazon S3 managed encryption keys (SSE-S3) B. Server-side encryption with AWS KMS managed keys (SSE-KMS) These options provide encryption for data stored in Amazon S3. SSE-S3 and SSE-KMS encrypt data at the object level using encryption keys managed by Amazon S3 and AWS Key Management Service (KMS), respectively.

正确答案是：A. 使用 Amazon S3 管理的加密密钥进行服务器端加密 (SSE-S3) ✅ B. 使用 AWS KMS 管理 的密钥进行服务器端加密 (SSE-KMS) ✅ 理由：SSE-S3 使用 Amazon S3 管理的密钥对静态数据进行加密。SSEKMS 与 AWS Key Management Service (KMS) 集成，可更好地控制加密密钥，包括密钥轮换和访问策略。TLS 和 SSL 用于传输中的数据，而非静态数据。透明数据加密 (TDE) 用于 Amazon RDS for Oracle 或 SQL Server 等数据 库，而非 S3 对象。置信度：高 参考资料：AWS S3 加密文档

A. 使用 Amazon S3 管理的加密密钥进行服务器端加密 (SSE-S3) 所有 Amazon S3 存储桶默认都已配置加 密，所有上传到 S3 存储桶的新对象都会自动进行静态加密。使用 Amazon S3 管理的密钥进行服务器端加密 (SSES3) 是 Amazon S3 中每个存储桶的默认加密配置。E. 透明数据加密 (TDE) 是一种用于对整个数据库（包括数据和日 志文件）进行静态加密的技术，以防止未经授权访问敏感数据。

comments: The AWS service used to track, record, and audit configuration changes made to AWS resources is: B. AWS Config. It allows you to assess, audit, and evaluate the configurations of your AWS infrastructure over time, helping you to maintain compliance, troubleshoot issues, and track changes.

AWS Config - does auditing and recording compliance of your AWS resources, record configurations and changes over time"

en_question: A customer runs an On-Demand Amazon Linux EC2 instance for 3 hours, 5 minutes, and 6 seconds. For how much time will the customer be billed?
comments: For On-Demand Amazon Linux EC2 instances, AWS bills using per-second billing, with a minimum of 60 seconds.
movie ticket based on the exact runtime.

Based on AWS docs https://aws.amazon.com/ec2/pricing/on-demand/ "Pricing is per instance-hour consumed for each instance, from the time an instance is launched until it is terminated or stopped. Each partial instance-hour consumed will be billed per-second for Linux, Windows, Windows with SQL Enterprise, Windows with SQL Standard, and Windows with SQL Web Instances, and as a full hour for all other OS types." The question is about Linux, so it will be billed per second.
对于按需提供的 Amazon Linux EC2 实例，AWS 按秒计费，最低计费周期为 60 秒。

根据 AWS 文档 https://aws.amazon.com/ec2/pricing/on-demand/，“定价按实例小时计算，从实例启动到 终止或停止为止。对于 Linux、Windows、Windows + SQL Enterprise、Windows + SQL Standard 和 Windows + SQL Web 实例，不足一小时的部分将按秒计费；对于所有其他操作系统类型，则按一小时计费。” 问题是关于 Linux 的，因此它将按秒计费。

cn_question: [AI翻译] 谁负责为 Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) 启用静态数据加密？
en_question: Who enables encryption of data at rest for Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS)?
comments: Not sure, but going for B: While AWS KMS does the encryption on a technical level, the customer needs to initiate the configuration in AWS KMS to do the encryption?! Otherwise, there wouldn't be unencrypted devices. Found this "You can enable encryption automatically on all new EBS volumes and snapshot copies in your AWS account and Region." This "you" is the customer... semantics, I know. Still going for B.

The answer is B. The customer has to select AWS KMS. If the customer does not explicit select it then nothing will be encrypted. The question asks "who enables encryption" not what is used to encrypt. Therefore, since the user has to enable the service the answer should be B the user.

Open the Amazon EC2 console at Select the Region from the navigation bar Select EC2 Dashboard from the navigation pane Choose Account Attributes, then Data protection and security in the upper-right corner In the EBS encryption section, choose Manage Select Enable for Always encrypt new EBS volumes Choose a default encryption key Select Update EBS encryption

It includes the ability to analyze resource policies to check for unintended external sharing of resources. Access Analyzer can identify AWS resources that are shared externally, providing insights into potential security risks and allowing you to adjust access policies accordingly.
C. AWS IAM 访问分析器
C. AWS IAM 访问分析器 AWS IAM 访问分析器是一项服务，可帮助您识别和管理 AWS 环境中的访问权限。 它能够分析资源策略，检查是否存在意外的外部资源共享。访问分析器可以识别外部共享的 AWS 资源，从而深入了解 潜在的安全风险，并允许您相应地调整访问策略。

This level of control is suitable for scenarios where the company wants to manage the entire software stack, including the operating system.

cn_question: 一家公司想将其 PostgreSQL 数据库迁移到 AWS。该公司不经常使用该数据库。 哪项 AWS 服务或资源能够以最小的管理开销满足这些要求？
en_question: A company wants to migrate its PostgreSQL database to AWS. The company does not use the database frequently. Which AWS service or resource will meet these requirements with the LEAST management overhead?
comments: If cost is not a concern and you want the least management overhead, Amazon Aurora Serverless would be the best option. Amazon Aurora Serverless provides the highest level of automation and scalability as it is a serverless database solution. You don't have to worry about managing database instances, scaling, or maintenance. The database automatically scales up and down to meet your application's requirements, and you only pay for the resources you actually use. So, the correct answer in this case would be: D. Amazon Aurora Serverless

Amazon Aurora Serverless - automatically starts up, shuts down, and scales capacity up or down based on your application's needs, thus, reducing management overhead.* Amazon Aurora PostgreSQL-Compatible Edition - a simple and cost-effective to set up, operate, and scale your new and existing PostgreSQL deployments. Amazon RDS for PostgreSQL - deploy scalable PostgreSQL deployments in minutes with cost-efficient and resizable hardware capacity.

Amazon Aurora Serverless is a fully managed database service that automatically adjusts capacity based on the workload. It is specifically designed for use cases where the database is not used frequently or has  variable workloads. With Aurora Serverless, you only pay for the database capacity that you use, and it automatically scales up and down as needed. This makes it a great fit for applications with unpredictable or infrequent usage.

如果成本不是问题，并且您希望管理开销最小，那么 Amazon Aurora Serverless 将是最佳选择。Amazon Aurora Serverless 是一款无服务器数据库解决方案，可提供最高级别的自动化和可扩展性。您无需担心数据库实例的 管理、扩展或维护。数据库会根据应用程序的需求自动扩展或缩减，您只需为实际使用的资源付费。因此，本例中的正 确答案是：D. Amazon Aurora Serverless

Amazon Aurora Serverless - 可根据您的应用程序需求自动启动、关闭和扩展容量，从而降低管理开销。* Amazon Aurora PostgreSQL 兼容版 - 可轻松经济地设置、运行和扩展您新建和现有的 PostgreSQL 部署。Amazon RDS for PostgreSQL - 可在几分钟内部署可扩展的 PostgreSQL 部署，并提供经济高效且可调整大小的硬件容量。

en_options.E: Manage the infrastructure layer and the operating system.

AWS responsibility “Security of the Cloud” - AWS is responsible for protecting the infrastructure that runs all of the services offered in the AWS Cloud. This infrastructure is composed of the hardware, software, networking, and facilities that run AWS Cloud services.

For abstracted services, such as Amazon S3 and Amazon DynamoDB, AWS operates the infrastructure layer, the operating system, and platforms, and customers access the endpoints to store and retrieve data

A. The least overhead is just having an account per BU. Otherwise you need to assing owners, work with tags, and have a billing structure you need to maintain.
A. 使用 AWS Organizations，并为每个业务部门创建一个账户。- AWS Organizations 允许您将所有账户组 织到一个主账户/管理账户下。这样，您可以轻松跟踪成本。

Amazon Timestream automatically scales up or down to adjust capacity and performance, so that you don t have to manage the underlying infrastructure."

Amazon Timestream is a fast, scalable, and serverless time series database service for IoT and operational applications that makes it easy to store and analyze trillions of events per day up to 1,000 times faster and at as little as 1/10th the cost of relational databases.
B 选项正确。“Amazon Timestream 是一种快速、可扩展且无服务器的时间序列数据库服务，可让您更轻松 地存储和分析每天数万亿条事件，速度最高可达传统方式的 1000 倍。Amazon Timestream 会自动扩展或缩减以调整 容量和性能，因此您无需管理底层基础设施。”

cn_question: 根据 AWS 责任共担模型，哪个选项是 AWS 和客户之间的共同控制？
en_question: Which option is a shared control between AWS and the customer, according to the AWS shared responsibility model?
comments: remember AWS is responsible for everything of the cloud and the customer is responsible for everything in the cloud so A and D could be correct if this were a two part answer question but A is the best for the real exam.

A. Configuration management In the AWS shared responsibility model, configuration management is a shared control. AWS is responsible for the infrastructure's configuration management, including the configuration of the hardware, software, networking, and facilities that run AWS services. On the other hand, the customer is responsible for configuration management at the application level, including the security configuration of AWS provided services such as Amazon EC2 instances, Amazon S3 buckets, and Amazon DynamoDB tables. So, both AWS and the customer have responsibilities when it comes to configuration management, making it a shared control.

BUt even IAM is correct too. For Configuration Management, AWS is responsible for the infrastructure's configuration management, while the customer is responsible for their own application-level configuration management. For IAM, AWS is responsible for the security and availability of the IAM service itself, while the customer is responsible for managing their IAM users, groups, roles, and policies.
请记住，AWS 负责云的一切，而客户负责云中的一切，因此如果这是一个两部分答案的问题，A 和 D 都可能 正确，但 A 是实际考试的最佳选择。
A. 配置管理 在 AWS 责任共担模型中，配置管理属于共享控制。AWS 负责基础设施的配置管理，包括运行 AWS 服务的硬件、软件、网络和设施的配置。另一方面，客户负责应用层面的配置管理，包括 AWS 提供的服务（例 如 Amazon EC2 实例、Amazon S3 存储桶和 Amazon DynamoDB 表）的安全配置。因此，AWS 和客户在配置管理 方面都负有责任，从而实现了共享控制。

en_options.D: S3 One Zone-Infrequent Access (S3 One Zone-IA)

comments: D. S3 One Zone-Infrequent Access (S3 One Zone-IA) For a scenario where data is rarely accessed, and the company can regenerate the data if needed, the most cost-effective storage class would be S3 One Zone-Infrequent Access (S3 One Zone-IA). This storage class stores data in a single availability zone, providing cost savings compared to storage classes that store data redundantly across multiple availability zones.
S3 One Zone-IA is ideal for customers who want a lower-cost option for infrequently accessed
D. S3 单区低频访问 (S3 单区-IA) 对于数据访问频率较低，且公司可根据需要重新生成数据的场景，最具成 本效益的存储类别是 S3 单区低频访问 (S3 单区-IA)。此存储类别将数据存储在单个可用区中，与跨多个可用区冗余存 储数据的存储类别相比，可显著节省成本。
S3 One Zone-IA 非常适合那些希望以较低成本解决访问频率较低的数据中心问题的客户。
D. S3 单区-不频繁访问 (S3 单区-IA) - 最具成本效益的解决方案，非常适合可以轻松重新创建且丢失后不重 要的数据。

cn_question: 一家公司已将其工作负载迁移到 AWS。该公司希望大规模采用 AWS，并提高运营效率和安全性。该公司应该使 用哪项 AWS 服务或框架来进行运维支持？
en_question: A company has migrated its workloads to AWS. The company wants to adopt AWS at scale and operate more efficiently and securely. Which AWS service or framework should the company use for operational support?
comments: AWS Managed Services (AMS) helps you adopt AWS at scale and operate more efficiently and securely. We leverage standard AWS services and offer operational guidance with specialized automations, skills, and experience that are contextual to your environment and applications

The AWS Cloud Adoption Framework (AWS CAF) helps organizations transition to the cloud by providing guidance and best practices across multiple dimensions, including business, people, governance, platform, security, and operations. It is designed specifically for companies that want to adopt AWS at scale and operate more efficiently and securely. AWS CAF enables organizations to build a comprehensive approach for cloud adoption, ensuring the right processes, resources, and practices are in place.
C. AWS Managed Services (AMS) - provides ongoing operational support for AWS workloads.
AWS 托管服务 (AMS) 可帮助您大规模部署 AWS，并提高运营效率和安全性。我们利用标准的 AWS 服务， 并提供基于您环境和应用程序的自动化、专业技能和经验的运维指导。
AWS 云采用框架 (AWS CAF) 通过在业务、人员、治理、平台、安全和运营等多个维度提供指导和最佳实 践，帮助企业顺利过渡到云端。它专为希望大规模采用 AWS 并实现更高效、更安全运营的企业而设计。AWS CAF 使 企业能够构建全面的云采用方案，确保合适的流程、资源和实践到位。

AWS CDK 支持 TypeScript、JavaScript、Python、Java、C#/.Net 和 Go。开发人员可以使用这些受支持 的编程语言之一来定义可重用的云组件。https://docs.aws.amazon.com/cdk/v2/guide/home.html

AWS Storage Gateway 将本地软件设备与云存储连接起来，从而在本地 IT 环境和 AWS 存储基础设施之间 实现无缝集成，并提供数据安全功能。您可以使用此服务将数据存储在 Amazon Web Services 云中，从而获得可扩展 且经济高效的存储，并有助于维护数据安全。AWS Storage Gateway 提供基于文件的文件网关（Amazon S3 文件和 Amazon FSx 文件）、基于卷的存储解决方案（缓存和存储）以及基于磁带的存储解决方案。

comments: Budgets: more advanced – track usage, costs, RI, and get alerts

AWS Budgets AWS Budgets is a service that allows you to set custom cost and usage budgets for your AWS resources and receive alerts when your actual costs or usage exceed the thresholds you defined. You can set up budgets based on various dimensions such as service, linked accounts, tags, and more. By setting up AWS Budgets, the company can define spending thresholds and receive alerts via email or SNS (Simple Notification Service) when their overall operating costs exceed the defined budgets. This allows them to proactively monitor and manage their AWS spending to ensure it stays within desired limits.

en_question: A company wants to use Amazon EC2 instances to provide a static website to users all over the world. The company needs to minimize latency for the users. Which solution meets these requirements?

en_options.A: Use EC2 instances in multiple edge locations.
en_options.B: Use EC2 instances in the same Availability Zone but in different AWS Regions.
en_options.C: Use Amazon CloudFront with the EC2 instances configured as the source.
en_options.D: Use EC2 instances in the same Availability Zone but in different AWS accounts.

comments: Amazon CloudFront is a content delivery network (CDN) service that accelerates the delivery of your websites, APIs, video content, or other web assets. In this scenario, using Amazon CloudFront is the most suitable option to minimize latency for users all over the world.

key word: static website* as in content. Therefore, it can't be B. as they are just physical locations, situated globally providing low latency, high throughput, but isn't used as a content delivery service.
C. Use Amazon CloudFront with the EC2 instances configured as the source.
Amazon CloudFront 是一种内容分发网络 (CDN) 服务，可加速您的网站、API、视频内容或其他网络资源的 交付。在这种情况下，使用 Amazon CloudFront 是最大限度降低全球用户延迟的最佳选择。
关键词：静态网站*，指的是内容。因此，选项B不可能是静态网站，因为它们只是遍布全球的物理位置，提 供低延迟、高吞吐量，但并不用作内容分发服务。

en_question: A company wants an AWS service to collect and process 10 TB of data locally and transfer the data to AWS. The company has intermittent connectivity. Which AWS service will meet these requirements?
comments: D. AWS Snowball Edge

AWS Snowball Edge is a type of Snowball device with on-board storage and compute power for select AWS capabilities. Snowball Edge can process data locally, run edge-computing workloads, and transfer data to or from the AWS Cloud. Each Snowball Edge device can transport data at speeds faster than the internet. This transport is done by shipping the data in the devices through a regional carrier. The appliances are rugged, complete with E Ink shipping labels. Snowball Edge devices have three options for device configurations—Storage Optimized, Compute Optimized, and Compute Optimized with GPU. When this guide refers to Snowball Edge devices, it's referring to all options of the device. When specific information applies only to one or more optional configurations of devices (such as how the Snowball Edge with GPU has an on-board GPU), it is called out specifically.

comments: Download the IAM credential report, then provide the report to the auditor.

The simplest way to provide an external auditor with a list of all IAM users, including the status of users' credentials and access keys, is: C. Download the IAM credential report, then provide the report to the auditor. The IAM credential report is a feature within AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) that provides a way to audit the status of credentials for all IAM users in an AWS account. It includes information about when each user's credentials were last used, the status of multi-factor authentication (MFA), and the status of access keys. This report can be generated and downloaded as a CSV file, making it easy to share with auditors or for compliance purposes.

cn_question: 公司可以使用AWS云中的安全组执行哪些任务？

cn_options.A: 仅允许通过特定端口访问 Amazon EC2 实例。
cn_options.B: 在子网级别拒绝恶意 IP 地址的访问。
cn_options.C: 保护 Amazon CloudFront 缓存的数据。
cn_options.D: 对 Amazon EC2 实例应用无状态防火墙。

en_question: Which task can a company perform by using security groups in the AWS Cloud?

en_options.A: Allow access to an Amazon EC2 instance through only a specific port.
en_options.B: Deny access to malicious IP addresses at a subnet level.
en_options.C: Protect data that is cached by Amazon CloudFront.
en_options.D: Apply a stateless firewall to an Amazon EC2 instance.

comments: A. Allow access to an Amazon EC2 instance through only a specific port.

Security groups are stateful. For example, if you send a request from an instance, the response traffic for that request is allowed to reach the instance regardless of the inbound security group rules. Responses to allowed inbound traffic are allowed to leave the instance, regardless of the outbound rules. So "D" is NOT the answer. "A" is the correct answer.
A. 仅允许通过特定端口访问 Amazon EC2 实例。
如，如果您从实例发送请求，则无论入站安全组规则如何，该请求的响应流量都可以到达该实例。对允许的入站流量的 响应也可以离开实例，无论出站规则如何。因此，“D”不是答案。“A”是正确答案。
A. 仅允许通过特定端口访问 Amazon EC2 实例。AWS 中的安全组用于控制进出 Amazon EC2 实例的流量。 它们充当实例的虚拟防火墙。您可以在安全组中定义规则，根据协议、端口和 IP 地址范围允许特定流量。因此，使用 安全组，您可以仅允许通过特定端口访问 Amazon EC2 实例，从而有效地控制允许的流量。

en_question: Which of the following are features of network ACLs as they are used in the AWS Cloud? (Choose two.)

en_options.C: They evaluate all rules before allowing traffic.
en_options.D: They process rules in order, starting with the lowest numbered rule, when deciding whether to allow traffic.
en_options.E: They operate at the instance level.

comments: A. They are stateless. D. They process rules in order, starting with the lowest numbered rule, when deciding whether to allow traffic.

A. They are stateless: Network ACLs do not maintain connection state information. Each packet is evaluated independently based on the rules defined in the ACL. D. They process rules in order, starting with the lowest numbered rule, when deciding whether to allow traffic: Network ACLs evaluate rules sequentially from the lowest numbered rule to the highest numbered rule. Once a rule that matches the traffic is found, further rule processing stops.
A, D. Another crap question
A. 它们是无状态的。D. 它们按顺序处理规则，从编号最小的规则开始，决定是否允许流量通过。
A. 它们是无状态的：网络访问控制列表 (ACL) 不维护连接状态信息。每个数据包都根据 ACL 中定义的规则进 行独立评估。D. 它们按顺序处理规则，从编号最小的规则开始，决定是否允许流量通过：网络 ACL 会按顺序评估规 则，从编号最小的规则到编号最大的规则。一旦找到与流量匹配的规则，后续的规则处理就会停止。

cn_question: 在 AWS 云采用框架 (AWS CAF) 的平台视角下，哪些功能属于此类？（选择两项。）

comments: B. Data engineering: This capability focuses on managing data pipelines, data storage, and data processing workflows to enable efficient data management and analytics in the cloud. C. Continuous integration and continuous delivery (CI/CD): This capability involves implementing automated processes for building, testing, and deploying software applications in a continuous manner, ensuring faster delivery cycles and improved software quality.

C. Continuous integration and continuous delivery (CI/CD) A. Performance and capacity management Explanation: In AWS CAF, the Platform perspective focuses on building, deploying, and operating the technology foundation (infrastructure, applications, and tooling). Typical capabilities include: CI/CD Performance and capacity management Infrastructure as code Compute, storage, networking, and database platforms Monitoring and observability Notes on distractors: B. Data engineering belongs to the Data perspective. D. Infrastructure protection belongs to the Security perspective. E. Change and release management belongs to the Operations perspective.

The correct answers are: A. Performance and capacity management ✅ C. Continuous integration and continuous delivery (CI/CD) ✅ Reasoning: In the Platform perspective of the AWS Cloud Adoption Framework (AWS CAF), the focus is on delivering and managing cloud workloads efficiently. This includes: Performance and capacity management → Ensuring workloads meet performance needs and scale efficiently. Continuous integration and continuous delivery (CI/CD) → Automating application build, test, and deployment pipelines. Other options: B. Data engineering → Falls under the Data perspective, not Platform. D. Infrastructure protection → Falls under the Security perspective. E. Change and release management → Falls under the Operations perspective. Confidence level: High Reference: AWS Cloud Adoption Framework (AWS CAF)

B. 数据工程：此功能专注于管理数据管道、数据存储和数据处理工作流，从而在云端实现高效的数据管理和 分析。C. 持续集成和持续交付 (CI/CD)：此功能涉及实施自动化流程，以持续的方式构建、测试和部署软件应用程序， 从而确保更快的交付周期和更高的软件质量。https://docs.aws.amazon.com/prescriptive-guidance/latest/aws-cafplatform-perspective/welcome.html

C. 持续集成和持续交付 (CI/CD) A. 性能和容量管理 说明：在 AWS CAF 中，“平台”视角侧重于构建、部署和 运维技术基础架构（基础设施、应用程序和工具）。典型功能包括：CI/CD、性能和容量管理、基础设施即代码、计算、 存储、网络和数据库平台、监控和可观测性。 干扰项说明：B. 数据工程属于“数据”视角。D. 基础设施保护属于“安全” 视角。E. 变更和发布管理属于“运维”视角。

cn_question: [AI翻译] 哪种 Amazon S3 存储类对于未知的访问模式最具成本效益？

cn_options.C: S3 One Zone-Infrequent Access (S3 One Zone-IA)

en_question: Which Amazon S3 storage class is MOST cost-effective for unknown access patterns?

en_options.C: S3 One Zone-Infrequent Access (S3 One Zone-IA)

comments: D. S3 Intelligent-Tiering S3 Intelligent-Tiering is the most cost-effective option for unknown access patterns. It automatically moves objects between two access tiers (frequent and infrequent access) based on changing access patterns. This helps optimize costs for data with unknown or changing access patterns.

D S3 Intelligent-Tiering is an Amazon S3 storage class that analyzes an AWS user's stored data and automatically moves it between storage tiers based on usage frequency. It is designed to optimize storage costs for data with irregular or unknown access patterns.

A: S3 Standard – Good for frequent access, but not optimized for cost when access patterns are unknown or infrequent. B: S3 Standard-IA – Lower cost for infrequent access, but incurs extra charges if data is accessed more than expected. C: S3 One Zone-IA – Cheaper but stores data in one Availability Zone, making it less durable and not ideal for unpredictable patterns. D: S3 Intelligent-Tiering , it's designed specifically for unknown or changing access patterns. It automatically moves data between frequent and infrequent access tiers based on usage, optimizing cost without performance loss.

cn_question: 哪些选项属于 AWS 云采用框架 (AWS CAF) 的安全视角功能？（选择两项。）
en_question: Which options are AWS Cloud Adoption Framework (AWS CAF) security perspective capabilities? (Choose two.)
comments: C. Incident response D. Infrastructure protection Explanation: In AWS CAF, the Security perspective includes capabilities such as: Incident response Infrastructure protection Identity and access management Detection and validation (e.g., security monitoring) Application security Data protection Governance, risk, and compliance Observability and incident/problem management are Operations perspective capabilities, and availability/continuity belongs to the Resilience (or Reliability/Operations) perspective rather than Security.

Incident and Problem Management: This capability involves processes and practices for managing security incidents and problems that arise within your cloud environment. It includes detecting, responding to, and resolving security issues to minimize impact.  Incident Response: This capability focuses on the procedures and tools needed to respond to and recover from security incidents. It includes identifying, managing, and mitigating the effects of security breaches or attacks.

selected answer : CD AWS Cloud Adoption Framework - CAF: Security perspective ・compliance and assurance ・Security Governance ・Security Assurance ・Data Protection ・Application Security ・Threat Detection ・Vulnerability Mgmt ・Identity and Access Mgmt ・Incident response ・Infrastructure protection
C. 事件响应 D. 基础设施保护 说明：在 AWS CAF 中，安全视角包括以下功能：事件响应、基础设施保护、 身份和访问管理、检测和验证（例如，安全监控）、应用程序安全、数据保护、治理、风险和合规性。可观测性和事件/ 问题管理是运维视角的功能，而可用性/连续性属于弹性（或可靠性/运维）视角，而不是安全视角。
事件和问题管理：此功能涵盖管理云环境中出现的安全事件和问题的流程和实践。它包括检测、响应和解决安 全问题，以最大限度地减少影响。事件响应：此功能侧重于响应和从安全事件中恢复所需的程序和工具。它包括识别、 管理和减轻安全漏洞或攻击的影响。

cn_question: AWS 云的哪项优势可以让公司在几分钟内快速部署云资源，从而访问计算、存储和数据库基础设施？
en_question: Which AWS Cloud benefit gives a company the ability to quickly deploy cloud resources to access compute, storage, and database infrastructures in a matter of minutes?
comments: A: Elasticity – Refers to automatically scaling resources up or down based on demand, not the speed of initial deployment. B: Cost savings – Refers to reduced capital expenditure and pay-as-you-go pricing, not deployment speed. C: Agility – agility is the AWS Cloud benefit that allows companies to quickly deploy and experiment with resources like compute, storage, and databases in minutes. D: Reliability – Refers to the ability of the system to recover from failures and remain available, not to deployment speed.
Agility = quickly deploy
Agility in cloud computing refers to the ability to quickly develop, test, and launch applications that the business needs.
A：弹性——指的是根据需求自动扩展或缩减资源，而非初始部署速度。B：成本节约——指的是降低资本支出 和按需付费的定价模式，而非部署速度。C：敏捷性——敏捷性是 AWS 云的一项优势，它允许企业在几分钟内快速部 署和试验计算、存储和数据库等资源。D：可靠性——指的是系统从故障中恢复并保持可用性的能力，而非部署速度。
云计算的敏捷性是指快速开发、测试和发布企业所需应用程序的能力。

cn_question: 之前用于开发的 Amazon EC2 实例无法访问，并且不再显示在 AWS 管理控制台中。 应该使用哪个 AWS 服务来确定导致此 EC2 实例无法访问的操作？
en_question: An Amazon EC2 instance previously used for development is inaccessible and no longer appears in the AWS Management Console. Which AWS service should be used to determine what action made this EC2 instance inaccessible?
comments: A: Amazon CloudWatch Logs Monitors logs from applications and services but does not show who performed actions on resources. B: AWS Security Hub provides a centralized view of security alerts and compliance status but does not track user activity or resource changes. C: Amazon Inspector Scans for vulnerabilities but does not track operational actions. D: AWS CloudTrail it records API calls and actions taken in the AWS environment, including who terminated or modified an EC2 instance

D. AWS CloudTrail AWS CloudTrail is the service that records API calls and related events made on your AWS account. If an Amazon EC2 instance is inaccessible or if there are actions taken on the instance, CloudTrail can be used to determine what actions were performed, who performed them, and when they occurred. It provides a detailed history of changes and activity within your AWS environment.
A：Amazon CloudWatch Logs 监控应用程序和服务的日志，但不显示谁对资源执行了操作。B：AWS Security Hub 提供安全警报和合规性状态的集中视图，但不跟踪用户活动或资源更改。C：Amazon Inspector 扫描漏 洞，但不跟踪操作。D：AWS CloudTrail 记录 AWS 环境中执行的 API 调用和操作，包括谁终止或修改了 EC2 实例。

cn_question: 一家公司的应用程序开发人员需要使用脚本快速配置和管理 AWS 服务。 开发人员应该使用哪种 AWS 服务来满足这些需求？

en_question: A company's application developers need to quickly provision and manage AWS services by using scripts. Which AWS offering should the developers use to meet these requirements?
comments: The AWS CLI is a command-line tool provided by AWS that allows developers and administrators to interact with AWS services directly from the command line. It provides a set of commands for a broad set of AWS services, allowing users to perform tasks such as creating and managing EC2 instances, configuring S3 buckets, managing IAM users, and more. Developers can use scripts and automation tools to orchestrate and automate various AWS operations by leveraging the AWS CLI commands.

A The AWS Command Line Interface (AWS CLI) is a unified tool to manage your AWS services. With just one tool to download and configure, you can control multiple AWS services from the command line and automate them through scripts.
AWS CLI 是 AWS 提供的一款命令行工具，它允许开发人员和管理员直接通过命令行与 AWS 服务进行交互。 它提供了一系列适用于各种 AWS 服务的命令，使用户能够执行诸如创建和管理 EC2 实例、配置 S3 存储桶、管理 IAM 用户等任务。开发人员可以利用 AWS CLI 命令，通过脚本和自动化工具来编排和自动化各种 AWS 操作。
AWS 命令​行界面 (AWS CLI) 是一个用于管理 AWS 服务的统一工具。只需下载并配置一个工具，即可通过命 令行控制多个 AWS 服务，并通过脚本实现自动化。

cn_question: 一家公司希望将非结构化数据迁移到 AWS。数据需要安全地迁移，包括传输过程中的加密和端到端的数据验证。 哪项 AWS 服务能够满足这些要求？

cn_options.A: AWS 应用程序迁移服务

en_question: A company wants to migrate unstructured data to AWS. The data needs to be securely moved with inflight encryption and end-to-end data validation. Which AWS service will meet these requirements?
comments: A: AWS Application Migration Service Used for migrating servers and applications, not for transferring unstructured data. B: Amazon EFS –Provides scalable file storage but does not handle data migration or transfer C: AWS DataSync it is designed to securely move large amounts of data, including unstructured data, with intransit encryption and end-to-end data validation. D: AWS Migration Hub Tracks migration progress but does not handle the actual data transfer.
C. AWS DataSync
Securely discover and migrate your data to AWS with end-to-end security, including data encryption and data integrity validation.
A：AWS 应用程序迁移服务用于迁移服务器和应用程序，不用于传输非结构化数据。B：Amazon EFS 提供可 扩展的文件存储，但不处理数据迁移或传输。C：AWS DataSync 旨在安全地移动大量数据（包括非结构化数据），提 供传输中加密和端到端数据验证。D：AWS Migration Hub 跟踪迁移进度，但不处理实际的数据传输。

C. AWS DataSync AWS DataSync 是一项旨在安全地在本地存储和 Amazon S3、Amazon EFS 或 Amazon FSx for Windows 文件服务器之间传输大量数据的服务。它支持传输过程中的加密和端到端数据验证。就本题而言， AWS DataSync 是将非结构化数据安全地迁移到 AWS 并确保整个迁移过程中数据加密和完整性的合适选择。因此，选 项 C，即 AWS DataSync，符合指定要求。

cn_question: 一个开发团队希望以快速、可重复的方式为应用程序部署多个测试环境。 该团队应该使用哪项 AWS 服务？
en_question: A development team wants to deploy multiple test environments for an application in a fast, repeatable manner. Which AWS service should the team use?
comments: Answer is B: Cloudformation. Provisioning complete environments While you can create complex test environments containing multiple instances using the AWS APIs, command line tools, or the AWS Management Console, AWS CloudFormation makes it even easier to create a collection of related AWS resources and provision them in an orderly and predictable fashion. AWS CloudFormation uses templates to create and delete a collection of resources together as a single unit (a stack). A complete test environment running on AWS can be described in a template, which is a text file in JSON or YAML format.
i believe option A - EC2 would require more operational overheard, thus making it less efficient
CloudFormation

答案是 B：CloudFormation。https://docs.aws.amazon.com/whitepapers/latest/development-and-teston-aws/testing-phase.html 配置完整的环境 虽然您可以使用 AWS API、命令行工具或 AWS 管理控制台创建包含多 个实例的复杂测试环境，但 AWS CloudFormation 可以更轻松地创建一组相关的 AWS 资源，并以有序且可预测的方 式进行配置。AWS CloudFormation 使用模板将一组资源作为一个整体（堆栈）进行创建和删除。运行在 AWS 上的完 整测试环境可以用模板来描述，模板是一个 JSON 或 YAML 格式的文本文件。
我认为方案 A（EC2）需要更多的运营成本，因此效率会更低。

cn_question: 一家公司希望快速部署持续集成/持续交付 (CI/CD) 流水线。 哪项 AWS 服务可以满足此需求？

D. AWS CodeStar

en_question: An ecommerce company wants to use Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling to add and remove EC2 instances based on CPU utilization. Which AWS service or feature can initiate an Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling action to achieve this goal?
comments: D. Amazon CloudWatch alarm To automatically add or remove EC2 instances based on CPU utilization, you can use Amazon CloudWatch alarms with Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling. You can create a CloudWatch alarm that monitors CPU utilization, and when the alarm threshold is breached, it triggers an Auto Scaling action to either add or remove EC2 instances, depending on your configuration. Therefore, the correct answer is D. Amazon CloudWatch alarm.

Amazon CloudWatch is a monitoring service that provides data and actionable insights for AWS resources. You can set up CloudWatch alarms to monitor metrics, such as CPU utilization, and trigger Auto Scaling actions based on defined thresholds.

AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS) AWS Database Migration Service (DMS) is the service designed to help migrate on-premises databases to managed cloud database services in a simplified manner. cn_question: AWS 的哪项功能为 AWS 用户提供了一个免费平台，让他们可以加入社区群组、提出问题、查找答案以及阅读社 区撰写的关于最佳实践的文章？

the answer is B

A：AWS 知识中心 – 提供来自 AWS 的操作指南文章，但它并非社区驱动型平台。B：AWS re:Post – 是一个 免费的、社区驱动型的问答平台，AWS 用户可以在这里提问、分享答案并阅读社区生成的最佳实践。C：AWS IQ – 将 客户与 AWS 认证的自由职业者联系起来，提供付费专家帮助，它并非免费的社区平台。D：AWS 企业支持 – 提供技术 支持的付费支持服务，它并非公共社区平台。

The design principle of updating components regularly and making changes in small, reversible increments aligns with the pillar of: C. Operational Excellence Operational excellence in the AWS Well-Architected Framework focuses on designing and operating workloads to deliver business value, with a strong emphasis on continuous improvement, responding to events, and  automation. Making regular updates in small, reversible increments supports the goal of achieving operational excellence by promoting agility and efficiency in the development and deployment processes.

Operational Excellence: Focus on creating applications that effectively support production workload. - Plan for and anticipate failure. - Deploy smaller, reversible changes. - Script operations as code. - Learn from failure and refine.
定期更新组件并以小幅度、可逆的方式进行更改的设计原则与以下支柱相一致：C. 卓越运营。AWS 架构完善 框架中的卓越运营侧重于设计和运营工作负载以交付业务价值，并高度重视持续改进、事件响应和自动化。定期以小幅 度、可逆的方式进行更新，有助于提高开发和部署流程的敏捷性和效率，从而支持实现卓越运营的目标。
卓越运营：专注于创建能够有效支持生产工作负载的应用程序。- 规划并预测故障。- 部署较小且可逆的变 更。- 将操作编写成代码。- 从失败中吸取教训并不断改进。

cn_question: [AI翻译] 一家公司正在将其应用程序从本地迁移到 AWS 云。该公司希望确保应用程序仅被分配执行所有操作所需的最低权限。哪项 AWS 服务可以满足这些需求？
en_question: A company is migrating its applications from on-premises to the AWS Cloud. The company wants to ensure that the applications are assigned only the minimum permissions that are needed to perform all operations. Which AWS service will meet these requirements?
comments: Agree with AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM)

A. AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) AWS IAM is the service specifically designed for managing access to AWS services and resources. It allows you to create and manage users, groups, and roles and define fine-grained permissions through policies. By carefully crafting IAM policies, you can grant only the necessary permissions to each application or user, following the principle of least privilege.

IAM is the service in AWS that enables you to manage access to AWS services and resources securely. With IAM, you can create and manage AWS users and groups, and you can grant them permissions to access specific AWS resources. IAM allows you to define fine-grained permissions, ensuring that each application or user is assigned only the minimum permissions needed to perform their required operations. This aligns with the principle of least privilege.

comments: The AWS account root user has the highest level of access and is associated with the email address used to create the AWS account. Certain tasks, such as the deletion of an entire AWS account, can only be performed by the AWS account root user. Other administrative tasks, like creating an organization in AWS Organizations or deleting IAM users, can often be performed by IAM users with appropriate permissions, and it is recommended to use IAM users instead of relying on the root user for day-to-day activities.
Correct answer: C
AWS 账户根用户拥有最高级别的访问权限，并与创建 AWS 账户时使用的电子邮件地址关联。某些任务（例 如删除整个 AWS 账户）只能由 AWS 账户根用户执行。其他管理任务（例如在 AWS Organizations 中创建组织或删除 IAM 用户）通常可以由具有相应权限的 IAM 用户执行，因此建议使用 IAM 用户而不是依赖根用户来处理日常活动。

cn_question: Amazon S3 智能分层存储类别提供哪些功能？

cn_options.A: 通过预留存储容量实现灵活的支付方式
cn_options.B: 通过将数据复制到加密的 Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) 卷来实现数据的长期保留。
cn_options.C: 根据访问模式的变化，通过在层级之间移动对象来自动节省成本
cn_options.D: 安全、耐用且成本最低的数据归档存储

en_question: What does the Amazon S3 Intelligent-Tiering storage class offer?

en_options.A: Payment flexibility by reserving storage capacity
en_options.B: Long-term retention of data by copying the data to an encrypted Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) volume
en_options.C: Automatic cost savings by moving objects between tiers based on access pattern changes Most Voted

comments: the answer is C
Amazon S3 Intelligent-Tiering is the only cloud storage class that delivers automatic storage cost savings when data access patterns change, without performance impact or operational overhead.

Amazon S3 Intelligent-Tiering is a storage class that automatically optimizes costs by moving objects between two access tiers—frequent and infrequent access—based on changing access patterns. It is designed to deliver the same low latency and high throughput performance of the S3 Standard storage class. This storage class automatically adjusts as access patterns change over time, optimizing costs without performance impact.
Amazon S3 智能分层是唯一一种能够在数据访问模式发生变化时自动节省存储成本，且不会影响性能或增加 运维开销的云存储类型。https://aws.amazon.com/s3/storage-classes/intelligent-tiering/
Amazon S3 智能分层存储是一种存储类别，它能够根据不断变化的访问模式，在频繁访问层和非频繁访问层 之间自动移动对象，从而优化成本。其设计旨在提供与 S3 标准存储类别相同的低延迟和高吞吐量性能。该存储类别会 随着访问模式随时间的变化自动调整，在不影响性能的前提下优化成本。

cn_question: [AI翻译] 一家公司正计划迁移到 AWS 云。该公司希望确定可衡量的业务成果，以解释其迁移决策的价值。云转型旅程的哪个阶段包括这些活动？
en_question: A company is planning to migrate to the AWS Cloud. The company wants to identify measurable business outcomes that will explain the value of the company's decision to migrate. Which phase of the cloud transformation journey includes these activities?
comments: AWS Cloud Adoption Framework - CAF: Phases There're 4 phases: How it works 1. Envision : identify measurable business outcomes and prioritize transformation opportunities in line with your strategic objectives. 2. Align : Identify capability gaps and cross-organizational dependencies. 3. Launch : focus executing cloud migration, deliver pilots in production 4. Scale : optimizing and expanding cloud capabilities / expand pilots and business value

With AWS Outposts, you can run compute and storage workloads locally on your premises while seamlessly connecting to the rest of AWS's broad array of services in the cloud. In this scenario, if the company wants to keep the data local and on-premises to meet regulatory requirements and maintain low latency between AWS and on-premises resources, AWS Outposts would be the suitable  option. cn_question: 公司需要搭建技术与业务之间的桥梁，以帮助其发展成为持续成长和学习的企业文化。AWS 云采用框架 (AWS CAF) 中的哪个视角可以作为这座桥梁？
en_question: A company needs a bridge between technology and business to help evolve to a culture of continuous growth and learning. Which perspective in the AWS Cloud Adoption Framework (AWS CAF) serves as this bridge?
comments: People Perspective serves as a bridge between technology and business, accelerating the cloud journey to help organizations more rapidly evolve to a culture of continuous growth, learning, and where change becomes business-as-normal, with focus on culture, organizational structure, leadership, and workforce.
People perspective - Culture Evolution
People Perspective 致力于搭建技术与业务之间的桥梁，加速云转型之旅，帮助企业更快地发展成为持续增 长、学习的文化，并将变革视为常态，重点关注文化、组织结构、领导力和员工队伍。

cn_question: AWS 架构完善框架的哪个支柱侧重于结构化和精简的计算资源分配？
en_question: Which AWS Well-Architected Framework pillar focuses on structured and streamlined allocation of computing resources?
comments: C. Performance efficiency The Performance Efficiency pillar of the AWS Well-Architected Framework focuses on the efficient use of computing resources to meet requirements and the maintenance of that efficiency as demand changes and technologies evolve.
C. 性能效率 AWS 良好架构框架的性能效率支柱侧重于高效利用计算资源来满足需求，并在需求变化和技术 发展时保持这种效率。

cn_question: 哪些 AWS 云采用框架 (AWS CAF) 功能属于治理视角？（选择两项。）
en_question: Which AWS Cloud Adoption Framework (AWS CAF) capabilities belong to the governance perspective? (Choose two.)
comments: In the AWS CAF Governance perspective, the standard capabilities are: Strategy management Portfolio management Investment and budgeting Risk management Policy and compliance “Program and project management” is part of the AWS CAF Operations perspective (it sits alongside capabilities like service management, change management, and incident/event management). “Event management” is also an Operations capability. “Product management” aligns more with the Business perspective. Therefore, for the Governance perspective, the correct options from the list are: C. Portfolio management D. Risk management

The correct answers are: A. Program and project management D. Risk management These two capabilities fall under the Governance perspective of the AWS Cloud Adoption Framework (AWS CAF), which focuses on ensuring business governance and controls, including managing risks and ensuring compliance.
A and D are correct
从 AWS CAF 治理视角来看，标准功能包括：战略管理、组合管理、投资和预算、风险管理、政策和合规性。 “项目和计划管理”属于 AWS CAF 运营视角（它与服务管理、变更管理和事件/事故管理等功能并列）。“事件管理”也是 一项运营功能。“产品管理”更符合业务视角。因此，对于治理视角，列表中正确的选项是：C. 组合管理 D. 风险管理
正确答案是：A. 项目和项目管理 D. 风险管理 这两种能力都属于 AWS 云采用框架 (AWS CAF) 的治理视角， 该框架侧重于确保业务治理和控制，包括管理风险和确保合规性。

cn_question: 一家公司希望使用 AWS 托管服务 (AMS) 进行运营支持，并希望了解 AMS 的功能范围。AMS 的哪项功能可以满足这些需求？
en_question: A company wants to use AWS Managed Services (AMS) for operational support and wants to understand the scope of AMS. Which AMS feature will meet these requirements?
comments: D. Application log monitoring

A. Landing zone and network management AWS Managed Services (AMS) offers landing zone and network management as part of its scope to assist companies in setting up and managing their AWS environment. This includes establishing a secure and wellarchitected foundation for workloads, setting up network connectivity, managing accounts and users, implementing security controls, and ensuring compliance with best practices and regulatory requirements.

AWS Managed Services (AMS) provides operational support for AWS infrastructure and services. This includes managing and monitoring application logs to ensure they are available, secure, and compliant with the company's requirements. Landing zone and network management, customer application development, and DevSecOps pipeline configuration are not typically part of the AMS scope.
A. 着陆区和网络管理 AWS 托管服务 (AMS) 提供着陆区和网络管理服务，旨在帮助企业设置和管理其 AWS 环境。这包括为工作负载建立安全且架构完善的基础架构、设置网络连接、管理账户和用户、实施安全控制，以及确保 符合最佳实践和监管要求。
AWS 托管服务 (AMS) 为 AWS 基础设施和服务提供运维支持。这包括管理和监控应用程序日志，以确保其可 用性、安全性和合规性。着陆区和网络管理、客户应用程序开发以及 DevSecOps 流水线配置通常不属于 AMS 的服务 范围。

cn_question: 一家公司希望将其本地 NoSQL 工作负载迁移到 Amazon DynamoDB。 哪项 AWS 服务可以满足此要求？

en_question: A company wants to migrate its on-premises NoSQL workload to Amazon DynamoDB. Which AWS service will meet this requirement?
comments: B. AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS) AWS DMS helps to migrate databases to AWS quickly and securely. It supports various source and target databases, including NoSQL databases like MongoDB, Cassandra, and Couchbase, making it suitable for migrating an on-premises NoSQL workload to Amazon DynamoDB.
Given answer is correct
B. AWS 数据库迁移服务 (AWS DMS) AWS DMS 可帮助用户快速安全地将数据库迁移到 AWS。它支持各种 源数据库和目标数据库，包括 MongoDB、Cassandra 和 Couchbase 等 NoSQL 数据库，因此非常适合将本地 NoSQL 工作负载迁移到 Amazon DynamoDB。

en_question: A company is in the process of finding correct Amazon EC2 instance types and sizes to meet its performance and capacity requirements. The company wants to find the lowest possible cost. Which option accurately characterizes the company's actions?
comments: C. Rightsizing Rightsizing involves finding the most suitable instance types and sizes to match performance and capacity requirements while optimizing costs. This process ensures that resources are neither underutilized nor overprovisioned, helping to minimize expenses while meeting workload demands.
Answer is correct
C. 实例规模优化 实例规模优化是指找到最合适的实例类型和大小，以满足性能和容量需求，同时优化成本。 此过程确保资源既不会利用不足也不会过度配置，从而有助于在满足工作负载需求的同时最大限度地降低成本。

Amazon Detective: 1.Investigate and quickly identify the root cause of potential security issues. 2.Automatically collect log data from your AWS resources and uses machine learning to help you visualize and conduct security investigations.
Amazon Detective 是利用机器学习分析 Amazon EC2 实例和其他 AWS 资源的日志数据来进行安全调查的 最佳服务。
Amazon Detective：1.快速调查并识别潜在安全问题的根本原因。2.自动收集来自您的 AWS 资源的日志数 据，并利用机器学习帮助您可视化和开展安全调查。

cn_question: 一家公司正在AWS云上发布一款移动应用。该公司希望应用用户通过社交媒体身份提供商（IdP）登录。 哪项AWS服务可以满足此要求？
en_question: A company is launching a mobile app in the AWS Cloud. The company wants the app's users to sign in through social media identity providers (IdPs). Which AWS service will meet this requirement?
comments: B. Amazon Cognito. Amazon Cognito is a fully managed identity service that allows you to easily add user sign-up and sign-in to your mobile and web applications. It supports social identity providers (IdPs) such as Facebook, Google, Amazon, and others, allowing users to sign in using their existing social media accounts.

B. Amazon Cognito Amazon Cognito provides authentication, authorization, and user management for web and mobile apps. Users can sign in directly with a user name and password, or through third-party identity providers such as Facebook, Google, and Amazon, as well as through enterprise identity providers via SAML 2.0. Amazon Cognito facilitates the integration of social media identity providers (IdPs), making it a suitable choice for the company's mobile app to allow users to sign in through social media.
B. Amazon Cognito。Amazon Cognito 是一项完全托管的身份服务，可让您轻松地将用户注册和登录功能 添加到您的移动和 Web 应用程序中。它支持 Facebook、Google、Amazon 等社交身份提供商 (IdP)，允许用户使用 其现有的社交媒体帐户登录。

cn_question: AWS有哪些配套服务或工具可以创建数据驱动的云规划业务案例？
en_question: Which complimentary AWS service or tool creates data-driven business cases for cloud planning?
comments: A its correct answer The complimentary AWS service that helps create data-driven business cases for cloud planning is AWS Migration Evaluator, formerly known as TSO Logic. AWS Migration Evaluator assists organizations in understanding the cost-benefits of moving to AWS by analyzing their current on-premises IT infrastructure usage and costs. It provides detailed reports and insights, enabling decision-makers to build compelling, data-driven business cases for cloud migration and planning. This tool helps in identifying the most cost-effective AWS services to meet an organization's specific needs, estimating the potential cost savings, and planning the migration strategy effectively.

正确答案是 A。AWS 提供的免费服务 AWS Migration Evaluator（原名 TSO Logic）可帮助企业创建数据驱 动的云规划业务案例。AWS Migration Evaluator 通过分析企业当前本地 IT 基础设施的使用情况和成本，帮助企业了 解迁移到 AWS 的成本效益。它提供详细的报告和分析，使决策者能够构建引人注目、数据驱动的云迁移和规划业务案 例。该工具可帮助企业识别满足其特定需求的最具成本效益的 AWS 服务，估算潜在的成本节省，并有效地规划迁移策 略。

cn_question: 使用 AWS Cost Explorer 可以演示哪种云概念？
en_question: Which cloud concept is demonstrated by using AWS Cost Explorer?
comments: A. Rightsizing. One of the key features of AWS Cost Explorer is rightsizing recommendations, which help users identify opportunities to optimize the cost and performance of their AWS resources by matching resource specifications to actual usage requirements.

A. Rightsizing AWS Cost Explorer is a tool that enables you to visualize, understand, and manage your AWS costs and usage over time. This aligns with the concept of rightsizing, which involves optimizing the allocation of cloud resources based on usage and cost. By using AWS Cost Explorer, you can identify underutilized resources and make informed decisions about adjusting resource allocation to reduce costs, which is a key aspect of rightsizing.
A. 合理调整资源规模。AWS Cost Explorer 的一个关键功能是合理调整资源规模建议，它通过将资源规格与 实际使用需求相匹配，帮助用户发现优化 AWS 资源成本和性能的机会。
A. 合理配置 AWS Cost Explorer 是一款工具，可帮助您可视化、了解和管理 AWS 成本和使用情况随时间的 变化。这与合理配置的概念相符，即根据使用情况和成本优化云资源的分配。通过使用 AWS Cost Explorer，您可以识 别未充分利用的资源，并就调整资源分配以降低成本做出明智的决策，这是合理配置的关键所在。

cn_question: 一家公司希望在 AWS 上部署一个非容器化的 Java Web 应用程序。该公司希望使用托管服务快速部署该应用程 序，并希望该服务能够自动配置容量、进行负载均衡、扩展并监控应用程序的运行状况。 哪项 AWS 服务能够满足这些要求？
en_question: A company wants to deploy a non-containerized Java-based web application on AWS. The company wants to use a managed service to quickly deploy the application. The company wants the service to automatically provision capacity, load balance, scale, and monitor application health. Which AWS service will meet these requirements?
comments: D. AWS Elastic Beanstalk

D. AWS Elastic Beanstalk AWS Elastic Beanstalk is an easy-to-use service for deploying and scaling web applications and services developed with Java, .NET, PHP, Node.js, Python, Ruby, Go, and Docker on familiar servers such as Apache, Nginx, Passenger, and IIS. You simply upload your code, and AWS Elastic Beanstalk automatically handles the deployment, from capacity provisioning, load balancing, and auto-scaling to application health monitoring. It is ideal for non-containerized Java-based web applications, as it abstracts the underlying infrastructure, allowing developers to focus on writing code rather than managing environments

cn_question: 哪项 AWS 服务或工具使用户能够以编程方式连接到 AWS 并部署资源？
en_question: Which AWS service or tool gives users the ability to connect with AWS and deploy resources programmatically?
comments: key word: programmatically*

D. AWS SDKs (Software Development Kits) AWS SDKs provide a set of tools for developers to integrate with and manage AWS services programmatically. These SDKs support multiple programming languages, including Java, Python, .NET, Node.js, PHP, Ruby, and Go, among others, enabling developers to use the language they are most comfortable with to interact with AWS services. Through these SDKs, developers can create, configure, and manage AWS resources directly from their applications.
D. AWS SDK（软件开发工具包） AWS SDK 为开发人员提供了一套工具，用于以编程方式集成和管理 AWS 服务。这些 SDK 支持多种编程语言，包括 Java、Python、.NET、Node.js、PHP、Ruby 和 Go 等，使开发人员能够 使用他们最熟悉的语言与 AWS 服务进行交互。通过这些 SDK，开发人员可以直接从他们的应用程序中创建、配置和管 理 AWS 资源。

利用可自定义的实例调整建议，优化 Amazon EC2 和 Amazon RDS 实例，以满足您的工作负载需求。
AWS Compute Optimizer 可帮助您高效利用 AWS 计算资源来处理工作负载。

cn_question: 一家公司希望制定一个适用于所有 AWS 服务（包括计算、存储和数据库资源）的中央数据保护策略。 哪个 AWS 服务能够满足此要求？
en_question: A company wants to define a central data protection policy that works across AWS services for compute, storage, and database resources. Which AWS service will meet this requirement?
comments: AWS Backup • Fully-managed service to centrally manage and automate backups across AWS services • On-demand and scheduled backups • Supports PITR (Point-in-time Recovery) • Retention Periods, Lifecycle Management, Backup Policies, … • Cross-Region Backup • Cross-Account Backup (using AWS Organizations)

C. AWS Backup AWS Backup is a fully managed backup service that makes it easy to centralize and automate the back up of data across AWS services in the cloud as well as on-premises. With AWS Backup, you can configure backup  policies and monitor backup activity for AWS resources in one place. This includes compute resources like EC2 instances, storage resources like EBS volumes, and database resources like RDS databases.
Given Answer is correct
AWS Backup • 完全托管的服务，可集中管理和自动化跨 AWS 服务的备份 • 按需备份和计划备份 • 支持 PITR（时间点恢复） • 保留期限、生命周期管理、备份策略等 • 跨区域备份 • 跨账户备份（使用 AWS Organizations）
C. AWS Backup AWS Backup 是一项完全托管的备份服务，可轻松集中和自动化备份云端和本地 AWS 服务 中的数据。借助 AWS Backup，您可以在一个位置配置备份策略并监控 AWS 资源的备份活动。这些资源包括计算资源 （例如 EC2 实例）、存储资源（例如 EBS 卷）和数据库资源（例如 RDS 数据库）。

cn_question: 一家公司需要根据业务类别对 AWS 使用成本进行分类和跟踪。 该公司应该使用哪项 AWS 服务或功能来满足这些要求？

en_question: A company needs to categorize and track AWS usage cost based on business categories. Which AWS service or feature should the company use to meet these requirements?
comments: keyword - categorize = tag
A. Cost allocation tags

A. Cost allocation tags Cost allocation tags enable you to categorize and track your AWS costs. When you apply tags to your AWS resources (such as EC2 instances or S3 buckets), AWS generates a Cost and Usage Report that includes usage and costs aggregated by tags. This allows you to allocate costs across your organization's business categories, making it easier to track and manage your AWS spending by project, department, application, or any other business-relevant dimension
A. 成本分配标签 成本分配标签可帮助您对 AWS 成本进行分类和跟踪。将标签应用于 AWS 资源（例如 EC2 实例或 S3 存储桶）后，AWS 会生成一份成本和使用情况报告，其中包含按标签汇总的使用情况和成本。这使您可以 将成本分配到组织的各个业务类别中，从而更轻松地按项目、部门、应用程序或任何其他与业务相关的维度跟踪和管理 AWS 支出。

cn_question: 一家公司需要整合多个 AWS 账户的账单。该公司需要使用一个账户代表所有其他账户付款。 为了满足此要求，该公司应该使用哪项 AWS 服务或工具？

cn_question: 一家公司正在AWS上构建一个新的应用程序。该公司需要确保即使某个应用程序组件发生故障，整个应用程序仍 然可用。 为了满足这一要求，该公司应该采用哪种设计原则？
en_question: A company is building a new application on AWS. The company needs the application to remain available if an individual application component fails. Which design principle should the company use to meet this requirement?
comments: A change or a failure in one component should not cascade to other components
D. Loose coupling

Loose coupling refers to designing the components of an application so that they are independent of one another. This allows the failure of one component to not affect the others, thus ensuring the application remains available and resilient even if an individual component fails. Loose coupling enables better fault tolerance and flexibility in managing the application.
一个组件的变更或故障不应波及其他组件。
松耦合是指将应用程序的各个组件设计成彼此独立。这样，一个组件的故障就不会影响其他组件，从而确保即 使某个组件发生故障，应用程序仍然可用且具有弹性。松耦合能够提高应用程序的容错能力和管理灵活性。

The correct answer is C. AWS Secrets Manager. It allows users to securely store and centrally manage secrets such as database credentials, API keys, and other sensitive information. You can use fine-grained AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) policies to control access to these secrets, and Secrets Manager also supports automatic rotation of secrets to meet security and compliance requirements1. If you need to retrieve a credential from Secrets Manager, you can log into the AWS account, choose Secrets Manager from the Services menu, search for the desired credential, and retrieve its secret value2.
C选项正确。需要讨论424、428和429这几个数字。谢谢。

AWS WAF – Web 应用程序防火墙 • 保护您的 Web 应用程序免受常见 Web 攻击（第 7 层） • 第 7 层是 HTTP（与第 4 层 TCP 相对） • 可部署在应用程序负载均衡器、API 网关和 CloudFront 上

cn_question: 一家公司将其网站托管在 Amazon EC2 实例上。该公司需要确保网站能够覆盖全球用户，并为用户提供最低延 迟。 该公司应该使用哪项 AWS 服务来满足这些要求？
en_question: A company hosts its website on Amazon EC2 instances. The company needs to ensure that the website reaches a global audience and provides minimum latency to users. Which AWS service should the company use to meet these requirements?
comments: Why not Amazon Route 53 which does the same to avoid network latency?
B. Amazon CloudFront

’ Amazon CloudFront: It s a content delivery network (CDN) service that distributes content globally through a network of edge locations. CloudFront caches and delivers static and dynamic content (including HTML, images, videos, and APIs) from the nearest edge location to the user, reducing latency significantly. By using CloudFront, the company can serve web content efficiently to users worldwide, improving their experience.
为什么不选择同样可以避免网络延迟的亚马逊 Routs 53 呢？
亚马逊 CloudFront：它是一种内容分发网络 (CDN) 服务，通过边缘节点网络在全球范围内分发内容。 CloudFront 从距离用户最近的边缘节点缓存并分发静态和动态内容（包括 HTML、图像、视频和 API），从而显著降低 延迟。通过使用 CloudFront，该公司可以高效地向全球用户提供 Web 内容，从而提升用户体验。

cn_question: AWS 的哪项设计原则强调减少应用程序组件之间的相互依赖性？
en_question: Which AWS design principle emphasizes the reduction of interdependencies between components of an application?
comments: • Loose Coupling: • Monolith are applications that do more and more over time, become bigger • Break it down into smaller, loosely coupled components • A change or a failure in one component should not cascade to other components
B. Loose coupling

B. Loose coupling The principle of loose coupling emphasizes the reduction of interdependencies between components of an application. This allows components to evolve independently and enhances system flexibility and resilience.
• 松耦合：• 单体应用会随着时间的推移不断增加功能，变得越来越庞大。• 将其拆分成更小、松耦合的组 件。• 一个组件的变更或故障不应波及其他组件。
B. 松耦合 松耦合原则强调减少应用程序组件之间的相互依赖性。这使得组件能够独立演进，从而增强系统的 灵活性和弹性。

B：创建 IAM 用户并提供仅通过编程方式访问的权限 --> 这将涵盖通过 AWS CLI 或 SDK 进行的访问。E：创 建具有 Amazon RDS 访问权限的 IAM 策略 --> 这将仅涵盖对 RDS 的访问，即仅授予访问所需资源（即 RDS 数据库） 的权限。

cn_question: 一家公司在 Amazon EC2 实例上运行一个报表 Web 服务器应用程序。该应用程序每周运行一次，每月月底运行 一次。EC2 实例在不使用时可以关闭。 对于这种用例，最具成本效益的计费模式是什么？
en_question: A company is running a reporting web server application on Amazon EC2 instances. The application runs once every week and once again at the end of the month. The EC2 instances can be shut down when they are not in use. What is the MOST cost-effective billing model for this use case?
comments: AWS On-Demand Capacity Reservations and On-Demand Instances serve different purposes: 1. On-Demand Capacity Reservations: -Purpose: Reserve compute capacity in a specific Availability Zone for any duration. -Flexibility: Can be created, modified, or canceled at any time. -Use Cases: Ideal for ensuring capacity for business-critical workloads, regulatory requirements, and disaster recovery. 2. On-Demand Instances: - Purpose: Provide compute capacity without any upfront commitment. - Flexibility: Pay for compute capacity by the hour or second, depending on the instance type. - Use Cases: Suitable for applications with unpredictable workloads or short-term requirements(1). (1) https://aws.amazon.com/compare/the-difference-between-on-demand-instances-and-reserved-instances/.
D. On-Demand Instances

In this scenario, the application only runs periodically—once every week and at the end of the month. Since the EC2 instances can be shut down when not in use, On-Demand Instances are the most cost-effective option. On-Demand Instances are ideal for intermittent workloads that do not require long-term or consistent usage commitments, allowing the company to pay only for the compute time they use.

AWS 按需容量预留和按需实例用途不同：1. 按需容量预留：- 用途：在特定可用区预留任意时长的计算容 量。- 灵活性：可随时创建、修改或取消。- 用例：非常适合确保业务关键型工作负载、监管要求和灾难恢复所需的容 量。2. 按需实例：- 用途：无需预付任何费用即可提供计算容量。- 灵活性：根据实例类型，按小时或秒付费。- 用 例：适用于工作负载不可预测或短期需求的应用(1)。(1) https://aws.amazon.com/compare/the-differencebetween-on-demand-instances-and-reserved-instances/
在这种情况下，应用程序仅定期运行——每周一次，每月月底一次。由于 EC2 实例在不使用时可以关闭，因 此按需实例是最具成本效益的选择。按需实例非常适合不需要长期或持续使用承诺的间歇性工作负载，使公司只需为实 际使用的计算时间付费。

ALB works at Layer 7, meaning HTTPS. NLB works at Layer 4.

ALB 工作在网络层（第七层），也就是 HTTPS。NLB 工作在网络层（第四层）。

comments: Correct answer: C. AWS Direct Connect Explanation: AWS Direct Connect provides a dedicated, private network link between your on-premises environment and AWS. Implementing it typically involves working with an ISP or network provider and using a colocation facility or a Direct Connect partner location to establish the physical connection. AWS VPN (A) uses the public internet to create an encrypted tunnel; it does not require a colocation facility. Amazon Connect (B) is a cloud-based contact center service; no ISP/colo setup is required beyond normal internet access. Internet gateway (D) is a VPC component that enables internet access for resources in the VPC; it does not require ISP coordination or colocation.

AWS Direct Connect requires working with: An internet service provider (ISP) or AWS Direct Connect Partner An AWS Direct Connect location (typically a colocation facility) AWS Direct Connect provides a dedicated, private network connection from on-premises infrastructure to AWS, which improves bandwidth consistency and reduces latency compared to internet-based connections. Why the other options are incorrect A. AWS VPN – Uses encrypted tunnels over the public internet; no colocation facility required. B. Amazon Connect – A cloud contact center service. D. Internet gateway – Enables internet access for a VPC; does not require a colocation facility.  ✅ Final Answer: C. AWS Direct Connect
Should this not be a VPN? Direct connect doesnt require an ISP, if youre going to route data over a site to site VPN it requires the internet, therefore an ISP and colocation facility (endpoint).

正确答案：C. AWS Direct Connect 解释：AWS Direct Connect 在您的本地环境和 AWS 之间提供专用的私 有网络链路。实施它通常需要与 ISP 或网络提供商合作，并使用托管机房或 Direct Connect 合作伙伴的机房来建立物 理连接。AWS VPN (A) 使用公共互联网创建加密隧道；它不需要托管机房。Amazon Connect (B) 是一种基于云的呼 叫中心服务；除了正常的互联网接入外，不需要任何 ISP/托管机房设置。互联网网关 (D) 是 VPC 组件，它为 VPC 中 的资源启用互联网访问；它不需要 ISP 协调或托管机房。

AWS Direct Connect 需要与以下机构合作：互联网服务提供商 (ISP) 或 AWS Direct Connect 合作伙伴； AWS Direct Connect 位置（通常是托管机房）。AWS Direct Connect 提供从本地基础设施到 AWS 的专用私有网络连 接，与基于互联网的连接相比，可提高带宽稳定性并降低延迟。其他选项错误的原因：A. AWS VPN – 使用公共互联网 上的加密隧道；无需托管机房。B. Amazon Connect – 一项云联络中心服务。D. 互联网网关 – 为 VPC 启用互联网访 问；无需托管机房。✅ 最终答案：C. AWS Direct Connect

en_question: A company uses a third-party identity provider (IdP). The company wants to provide its employees with access to AWS accounts and services without requiring another set of login credentials. Which AWS service will meet this requirement?
comments: B. Amazon Cognito Amazon Cognito allows you to add user sign-up, sign-in, and access control to your web and mobile apps quickly and easily. With Cognito, you can integrate with your existing third-party identity provider (IdP) through industry-standard protocols such as OpenID Connect (OIDC) and SAML 2.0.

’ Correct answer: C. AWS IAM Identity Center Explanation: AWS IAM Identity Center (formerly AWS Single Sign-On) enables federated access to AWS accounts and applications using an existing third-party IdP via SAML or OIDC, so employees can sign in with their existing corporate credentials without creating separate AWS logins. AWS Directory Service (A) integrates with Microsoft Active Directory for directory needs but doesn t itself provide cross-account SSO with third-party IdPs as seamlessly as IAM Identity Center. Amazon Cognito (B) is primarily for end-user authentication to your applications, not for workforce access to AWS accounts and services.

AWS IAM Identity Center (formerly AWS Single Sign-On) enables single sign-on (SSO) for workforce users by integrating with a third-party identity provider (IdP). It allows employees to:  Use their existing corporate credentials Access multiple AWS accounts and AWS services Avoid managing separate AWS usernames and passwords Why the other options are incorrect A. AWS Directory Service – Provides managed directories, but does not directly provide SSO across AWS accounts by itself. B. Amazon Cognito – Designed for customer-facing application users, not workforce access to AWS accounts. D. AWS Resource Access Manager (AWS RAM) – Shares AWS resources across accounts, not identities. ✅ Final Answer: C. AWS IAM Identity Center

正确答案：C. AWS IAM Identity Center 解释：AWS IAM Identity Center（原名 AWS Single Sign-On）支 持使用现有的第三方身份提供商 (IdP) 通过 SAML 或 OIDC 进行联合身份验证，从而实现对 AWS 账户和应用程序的访 问，员工可以使用现有的企业凭证登录，而无需创建单独的 AWS 登录帐户。AWS Directory Service (A) 可与 Microsoft Active Directory 集成以满足目录需求，但其本身与第三方 IdP 的跨账户 SSO 集成不如 IAM Identity Center 那么无缝。Amazon Cognito (B) 主要用于最终用户对应用程序的身份验证，而非员工对 AWS 账户和服务的访 问。

AWS IAM Identity Center（原名 AWS Single Sign-On）通过与第三方身份提供商 (IdP) 集成，为员工用户 提供单点登录 (SSO) 功能。它允许员工：使用现有的企业凭证访问多个 AWS 账户和 AWS 服务；避免管理单独的 AWS 用户名和密码。其他选项错误的原因：A. AWS Directory Service – 提供托管目录，但本身并不直接提供跨 AWS 账户的 SSO。B. Amazon Cognito – 专为面向客户的应用程序用户设计，而非员工访问 AWS 账户。D. AWS Resource Access Manager (AWS RAM) – 跨账户共享 AWS 资源，而非共享身份。✅ 最终答案：C. AWS IAM Identity Center

Rehosting, also known as "lift and shift," is the migration strategy where you move an existing workload from on-premises to AWS without making any changes to the application itself. cn_question: [AI翻译] 一家公司计划将应用程序迁移到 AWS 云。在系统审计中，该公司发现其内容管理系统（CMS）应用程序与云环境不兼容。哪些迁移策略可以帮助该公司以最少的工作量迁移 CMS 应用程序？（选择两项）
en_question: A company is planning to migrate applications to the AWS Cloud. During a system audit, the company finds that its content management system (CMS) application is incompatible with cloud environments. Which migration strategies will help the company to migrate the CMS application with the LEAST effort? (Choose two.)
comments: It's not (E) Refactor, requiring significant development effort and increased migration timelines. I don't think (A) Retire is an option only because the question states which strategies will help the company migrate the CMS application with the LEAST effort. Choosing to Retire will not help them migrate. This leaves us with Rehost, Repurchase, and Replatform. Based on the following and a process of elimination, my choices would be B and C. B) Rehost - Benefits: Rapid migration, minimal code changes, reduced risk. May not fully leverage cloud-native features, potential for suboptimal cost and performance. C) Repurchase - Benefits: Rapid migration, reduced maintenance burden, potential for cost savings. Limited customization, potential for data migration challenges. D) Replatform - Benefits: Balance of speed and optimization, leverage cloud benefits. Requires careful planning, potential for increased complexity.
It states "planning to migrate applications", it only mentions the CMS specifically to state its incompatible. I think A and C are the only 2 options

’ A. Retire If the CMS is incompatible and not needed or can be consolidated/eliminated, retiring it avoids migration effort entirely. C. Repurchase Replace the existing CMS with a cloud-native SaaS solution (e.g., a managed CMS). This avoids heavy rework and is typically faster than modifying the existing application to run in the cloud. Notes on the others: B. Rehost (“lift and shift”) is low effort in general, but it won t help if the application is incompatible with cloud environments.

A. Retire If the CMS is incompatible and not needed or can be consolidated/eliminated, retiring it avoids migration effort entirely. C. Repurchase Replace the existing CMS with a cloud-native SaaS solution (e.g., a managed CMS). This avoids heavy rework and is typically faster than modifying the existing application to run in the cloud. Notes on the others: B. Rehost (“lift and shift”) is low effort in general, but it won’t help if the application is incompatible with cloud environments.

cn_question: 一家公司在自建数据中心的自托管服务器上运行 MySQL 数据库工作负载。该公司希望将这些数据库工作负载迁 移到 AWS 托管服务。 该公司应该采用哪种迁移策略？
en_question: A company runs MySQL database workloads on self-managed servers in an on-premises data center. The company wants to migrate the database workloads to an AWS managed service. Which migration strategy should the company use?
comments: Replatform “lift and reshape” • Example: migrate your database to RDS • Example: migrate your application to Elastic Beanstalk • Not changing the core architecture, but leverage some Cloud optimizations • Save time and money by moving to a fully managed service or Serverless
D. Replatform - a few adjustments will have to be made, so replatforming is the right answer vs rehosting.

The answer is D, Replatform. This strategy is also known as lift, tinker, and shift or lift and reshape. Using this migration strategy, you move the application to the cloud, and you introduce some level of optimization in order to operate the application efficiently, to reduce costs, or to take advantage of cloud capabilities. For example, you might replatform a  Microsoft SQL Server database to Amazon RDS for SQL Server. Using this strategy, you might make a few or many changes to the application, depending on your business goals and your target platform. The following are common use cases for the replatform migration strategy: You want to save time and reduce cost by moving to a fully managed service or serverless service in the AWS Cloud.
平台迁移“直接迁移并重塑” • 例如：将数据库迁移到 RDS • 例如：将应用程序迁移到 Elastic Beanstalk • 不 改变核心架构，但利用一些云优化 • 通过迁移到完全托管服务或无服务器架构，节省时间和成本
D. 重新平台化 - 需要进行一些调整，因此重新平台化是正确的选择，而不是重新托管。

en_question: A company is planning to migrate to the AWS Cloud. The company is conducting organizational transformation and wants to become more responsive to customer inquiries and feedback. Which task should the company perform to meet these requirements, according to the AWS Cloud Adoption Framework (AWS CAF)?

en_options.A: Realign teams to focus on products and value streams.
en_options.B: Create new value propositions with new products and services.
en_options.C: Use a new data and analytics platform to create actionable insights.

comments: A. Realign teams to focus on products and value streams.

According to the AWS Cloud Adoption Framework (AWS CAF), an organization undergoing cloud migration should focus on optimizing people, processes, and technology to enhance customer responsiveness. The People Perspective of the AWS CAF emphasizes that aligning teams to focus on products and value streams is essential for increasing agility, reducing time-to-market, and improving customer responsiveness. By organizing teams around customer-focused products or services, the company can respond more effectively to customer inquiries and feedback.

Answer is A. Organization - Reimagine how your business and technology teams create customer value and meet your strategic intent. Organizing your teams around products and value streams while leveraging agile methods to rapidly iterate and evolve will help you become more responsive and customer centric.
A. 重新调整团队，使其专注于产品和价值流。
根据 AWS 云采用框架 (AWS CAF)，正在进行云迁移的组织应着重优化人员、流程和技术，以提升客户响应 能力。AWS CAF 的“人员视角”强调，使团队专注于产品和价值流对于提高敏捷性、缩短产品上市时间以及提升客户响 应能力至关重要。通过围绕以客户为中心的产品或服务组建团队，公司可以更有效地响应客户的咨询和反馈。

en_question: Which benefit of the AWS Cloud helps companies achieve lower usage costs because of the aggregate usage of all AWS users?

en_options.B: Ability to go global in minutes

comments: C. Economies of scale

Economies of scale is a key benefit of the AWS Cloud that allows companies to achieve lower costs due to the vast aggregate usage across all AWS customers. AWS can buy and operate infrastructure at a massive scale, which reduces per-unit costs and allows AWS to pass these savings on to customers. This leads to lower prices for cloud services compared to what individual companies might pay for their own infrastructure.
规模经济是 AWS 云的一项关键优势，它使企业能够通过所有 AWS 客户的庞大总体使用量来降低成本。AWS 可以大规模地购买和运营基础设施，从而降低单位成本，并将这些节省的成本回馈给客户。这使得云服务的价格远低于 单个企业自行建设基础设施的成本。

cn_question: 一家公司希望使用基础设施即代码 (IaC) 模板来管理其云资源。该公司需要满足合规性要求。 为了满足这些要求，该公司应该使用哪项 AWS 服务？
en_question: A company wants to manage its cloud resources by using infrastructure as code (IaC) templates. The company needs to meet compliance requirements. Which AWS service should the company use to meet these requirements?
comments: D. AWS Service Catalog

AWS Service Catalog allows organizations to create, manage, and distribute approved collections of cloud resources, referred to as products. It helps organizations enforce compliance requirements by ensuring that only compliant, pre-approved infrastructure templates (e.g., AWS CloudFormation templates) are available for deployment. By using AWS Service Catalog, the company can standardize resource provisioning and enforce consistent configurations that align with its compliance requirements.

Answer is D: AWS Service Catalog lets you centrally manage your cloud resources to achieve governance at scale of your infrastructure as code (IaC) templates, written in CloudFormation or Terraform configurations. With AWS Service Catalog, you can meet your compliance requirements while making sure your customers can quickly deploy the cloud resources they need.
AWS Service Catalog 允许组织创建、管理和分发已获批准的云资源集合（称为产品）。它通过确保只有符合 规范且预先批准的基础设施模板（例如 AWS CloudFormation 模板）可供部署，帮助组织强制执行合规性要求。通过 使用 AWS Service Catalog，公司可以标准化资源配置，并强制执行符合其合规性要求的统一配置。
答案是 D：https://aws.amazon.com/servicecatalog/ AWS Service Catalog 可让您集中管理云资源，从而 大规模地管理以 CloudFormation 或 Terraform 配置编写的基础设施即代码 (IaC) 模板。借助 AWS Service Catalog，您可以满足合规性要求，同时确保客户能够快速部署所需的云资源。

cn_question: 一家公司的应用程序目前运行在 Amazon EC2 实例上。该公司计划在明年部分迁移到无服务器架构，并希望预先 支付资源费用。 哪种 AWS 购买方案能够最大程度地降低该公司的成本？
en_question: A company's application is running on Amazon EC2 instances. The company is planning a partial migration to a serverless architecture in the next year and wants to pay for resources up front. Which AWS purchasing option will optimize the company's costs?
comments: For a company that is planning a partial migration to a serverless architecture in the next year and wants to pay for resources up front to optimize costs, the best AWS purchasing option is: D. Compute Savings Plan The other options are less suitable for this scenario: A. Convertible Reserved Instances are a billing discount applied to specific EC2 instances and do not provide flexibility for serverless workloads. B. Spot Instances are suitable for fault-tolerant and flexible workloads but do not offer the ability to pay upfront for a commitment period. C. EC2 Instance Savings Plans provide discounts on EC2 instances only and do not extend to serverless services like Lambda or Fargate. By choosing a Compute Savings Plan and paying upfront, the company can optimize costs for their current EC2 usage and seamlessly transition to serverless services as their migration progresses, without losing the committed savings. This flexibility aligns well with their planned partial migration to a serverless architecture.

Yes, you can use AWS Compute Savings Plans for serverless services. Compute Savings Plans offer flexible pricing and apply to various AWS compute services, including AWS Lambda and AWS Fargate¹². This means you can benefit from cost savings on your serverless workloads by committing to a consistent amount of usage over a 1- or 3-year term¹. Would you like more details on how to set up a Compute Savings Plan or how it works with serverless services?  Source: Conversation with Copilot, 12/13/2024 (1) Compute Savings Plans – Amazon Web Services. https://aws.amazon.com/savingsplans/compute-pricing/. (2) Services eligible for Savings Plans benefits - Savings Plans. (3) Cloud Cost Savings - Savings Plans - AWS. https://aws.amazon.com/savingsplans/.

Convertible Reserved Instances (RIs) allow customers to purchase EC2 capacity at a discounted rate compared to On-Demand pricing while providing the flexibility to change instance families, operating systems, or tenancies during the term of the reservation. This flexibility makes it ideal for a company that plans to migrate partially to serverless architecture, as it can adjust its RIs to match changing requirements over time. The upfront payment option can further optimize costs. Compute Savings Plans provide discounts on compute services, offering the flexibility to switch between EC2, AWS Lambda, and Fargate. However, they are better suited for fully serverless or containerized migrations rather than for managing upfront costs or EC2-focused workloads in a transitional phase.

对于计划在未来一年内部分迁移到无服务器架构并希望预先支付资源费用以优化成本的公司而言，最佳的 AWS 购买方案是：D. 计算节省计划。其他方案不太适合这种情况：A. 可转换预留实例是针对特定 EC2 实例的计费折 扣，但无法为无服务器工作负载提供灵活性。B. 竞价型实例适用于容错性和灵活性高的工作负载，但无法预先支付承诺 期限的费用。C. EC2 实例节省计划仅为 EC2 实例提供折扣，不适用于 Lambda 或 Fargate 等无服务器服务。通过选 择计算节省计划并预先支付费用，该公司可以优化当前 EC2 使用成本，并在迁移过程中无缝过渡到无服务器服务，而 不会损失已承诺的节省金额。这种灵活性与他们计划的部分迁移到无服务器架构的目标非常契合。
是的，您可以将 AWS 计算节省计划用于无服务器服务。计算节省计划提供灵活的定价，并适用于各种
