en_question: A company must archive its documents by using a write-once, read-many (WORM) model to meet legal and compliance obligations. Which feature of Amazon S3 can the company use to meet this requirement?
comments: S3 Glacier Vault Lock allows you to enforce compliance controls on your archived data in Glacier, ensuring data is stored in a "write once, read many" (WORM) manner, meaning it cannot be modified or deleted within a predefined period
C. S3 Glacier Vault Lock

S3 Glacier Vault Lock provides the ability to lock your Glacier vaults to enforce WORM protection. Once a vault is locked with a retention policy, data cannot be modified or deleted for the specified retention period, ensuring compliance with regulatory requirements for write-once, read-many storage. This feature is specifically designed to meet compliance and regulatory requirements for immutable data storage.
S3 Glacier Vault Lock 允许您对 Glacier 中归档的数据实施合规性控制，确保数据以“一次写入，多次读取” （WORM）的方式存储，这意味着在预定义的期限内，数据无法被修改或删除。
S3 Glacier Vault Lock 功能允许您锁定 Glacier 数据库，以强制执行 WORM（一次写入，多次读取）保护。 一旦数据库被锁定并设置了保留策略，在指定的保留期内，数据将无法被修改或删除，从而确保符合“一次写入，多次 读取”存储的监管要求。此功能专为满足不可变数据存储的合规性和监管要求而设计。

cn_question: [AI翻译] 哪种 AWS 解决方案使公司能够使用 NFS 等协议在 Amazon S3 中存储和检索对象？

cn_options.C: AWS Storage Gateway 文件网关

en_question: Which AWS solution gives companies the ability to use protocols such as NFS to store and retrieve objects in Amazon S3?
comments: C. AWS Storage Gateway file gateway

While Amazon FSx for Lustre supports NFS and can integrate with Amazon S3 for high-performance workloads (such as caching data from S3), it is primarily intended for use cases requiring high-performance computing (HPC) and parallel data processing. Its purpose is to optimize compute-heavy tasks by providing a fast file system that can process large-scale data, not to serve as a storage gateway solution for seamlessly storing and retrieving data from S3 via NFS. The correct answer was C. AWS Storage Gateway file gateway, because AWS Storage Gateway file gateway is specifically designed to allow companies to use NFS (or SMB) protocols to store and retrieve data directly in S3. It acts as a bridge between on-premises environments and Amazon S3, enabling easy integration for businesses that want to store their files as objects in S3.

’ Amazon FSx for Lustre is a managed file system that provides a high-performance file system optimized for compute-intensive workloads. It supports the Network File System (NFS) protocol and can be linked to Amazon S3. When you create an Amazon FSx for Lustre file system, you can link it to an S3 bucket, enabling you to access objects in S3 using the NFS protocol. AWS Storage Gateway file gateway might seem like a good candidate due to its support for NFS, but it s important to note that Amazon FSx for Lustre provides a more integrated and performant solution for linking file systems with S3, particularly for use cases requiring high-performance compute.

Amazon FSx for Lustre is a managed file system that provides a high-performance file system optimized for compute-intensive workloads. It supports the Network File System (NFS) protocol and can be linked to Amazon S3. When you create an Amazon FSx for Lustre file system, you can link it to an S3 bucket, enabling you to access objects in S3 using the NFS protocol. AWS Storage Gateway file gateway might seem like a good candidate due to its support for NFS, but it’s important to note that Amazon FSx for Lustre provides a more integrated and performant solution for linking file systems with S3, particularly for use cases requiring highperformance compute.

’ Amazon Rekognition is a cloud-based image and video analysis service that makes it easy to add advanced computer vision capabilities to your applications. The service is powered by proven deep learning technology and it requires no machine learning expertise to use. Amazon Rekognition includes a simple, easy-to-use API that can quickly analyze any image or video file that s stored in Amazon S3. You can add features that detect objects, text, unsafe content, analyze images/videos, and compare faces to your application using Rekognition's APIs. With Amazon Rekognition's face recognition APIs, you can detect, analyze, and compare faces for a wide variety of use cases, including user verification, cataloging, people counting, and public safety.
A. Amazon Rekognition = 图像和视频分析

Amazon Rekognition 是一项基于云的图像和视频分析服务，可轻松为您的应用程序添加高级计算机视觉功 能。该服务采用成熟的深度学习技术，无需任何机器学习专业知识即可使用。Amazon Rekognition 包含一个简单易用 的 API，可以快速分析存储在 Amazon S3 中的任何图像或视频文件。您可以使用 Rekognition 的 API 为您的应用程序 添加检测物体、文本、不安全内容、分析图像/视频以及人脸比对等功能。借助 Amazon Rekognition 的人脸识别 API，您可以检测、分析和比对人脸，适用于各种应用场景，包括用户验证、目录管理、人数统计和公共安全。

comments: D. No Upfront Reserved Instances is best: requires no upfront payment. It is the MOST cost-effective. Partial Upfront Reserved Instances: Also a good choice, but requires some upfront payment—may not be the most cost-effective.
B. Partial Upfront Reserved Instances - with this you commit to a one year term (paying a portion of the cost upfront) and do not pay as much hourly as you would with On-Demand Instances.
D. 无需预付预留实例是最佳选择：无需任何预付款，性价比最高。部分预付预留实例也是一个不错的选择， 但需要预付一部分费用，可能并非最具成本效益。
B. 部分预付预留实例 - 通过这种方式，您可以承诺一年的期限（预付一部分费用），并且每小时支付的费用不 会像按需实例那样高。

comments: The phrase “Stop guessing capacity” is often used in the context of cloud computing. It highlights one of the key benefits of cloud services: the ability to scale resources up or down based on actual demand, rather than having to predict and invest in infrastructure capacity ahead of time. This approach helps avoid the costs associated with over-provisioning (buying more capacity than needed) or under-provisioning (not having enough capacity to meet demand).
B. Stop guessing capacity
“停止猜测容量”这句话经常出现在云计算领域。它突显了云服务的一项关键优势：能够根据实际需求灵活扩展 或缩减资源，而无需提前预测和投资基础设施容量。这种方法有助于避免因过度配置（购买超出实际需求的容量）或配 置不足（容量不足以满足需求）而产生的成本。

cn_question: 一家公司使用 Amazon Aurora 作为其数据库服务。该公司希望对其数据库和数据库备份进行加密。 根据 AWS 责任共担模型，数据库集群和数据库快照的加密由哪一方负责管理？
en_question: A company uses Amazon Aurora as its database service. The company wants to encrypt its databases and database backups. Which party manages the encryption of the database clusters and database snapshots, according to the AWS shared responsibility model?
comments: Amazon Aurora is a fully managed database service. According to the AWS shared responsibility model, AWS is responsible for managing the encryption of: Database clusters Automated backups Database snapshots This includes the encryption mechanisms and infrastructure (such as storage-level encryption using AWSmanaged services). What the company is responsible for: Choosing whether encryption is enabled Managing access controls and permissions Managing encryption keys (if using customer-managed keys in AWS KMS) ✅ Under the AWS shared responsibility model, AWS manages the encryption of Amazon Aurora database clusters and snapshots.

AWS is responsible for "security of the cloud" – meaning they manage the infrastructure, including the encryption mechanisms that protect managed services like Amazon Aurora, RDS snapshots, and backups. The company (customer) is responsible for "security in the cloud" – such as managing database access, IAM policies, and choosing whether or not to enable encryption.
Aurora is serverless which means AWS manages the security of data

Amazon Aurora 是一项完全托管的数据库服务。根据 AWS 的责任共担模型，AWS 负责管理以下内容的加 密：数据库集群、自动备份和数据库快照。这包括加密机制和基础设施（例如使用 AWS 托管服务的存储级加密）。 AWS 负责：选择是否启用加密；管理访问控制和权限；管理加密密钥（如果使用 AWS KMS 中的客户管理密钥）。✅ 根据 AWS 的责任共担模型，AWS 管理 Amazon Aurora 数据库集群和快照的加密。
AWS 负责“云安全”，这意味着他们管理基础设施，包括保护 Amazon Aurora、RDS 快照和备份等托管服务 的加密机制。公司（客户）负责“云中安全”，例如管理数据库访问、IAM 策略以及选择是否启用加密。

cn_question: 一家公司希望保持带宽吞吐量，并提供比公共互联网连接更稳定的网络体验。 该公司应该选择哪项 AWS 服务？
en_question: A company wants to maintain bandwidth throughput and provide a more consistent network experience than public internet-based connections. Which AWS service should the company choose?
comments: B. AWS Direct Connect - establishes a dedicated, private connection between your on-premises data center or colocation facility and AWS.

AWS Direct Connect establishes a dedicated network connection from your premises to AWS, which can reduce network costs, increase bandwidth throughput, and provide a more consistent network experience compared to internet-based connections1. Amazon CloudFront is a content delivery network (CDN) service that speeds up the distribution of your static and dynamic web content, such as .html, .css, .js, and image files, to your users. While it improves the delivery speed and performance of your content, it does not provide a dedicated network connection or address the need for consistent bandwidth throughput and network experience

AWS Direct Connect (B): This service allows you to establish a dedicated network connection from your onpremises data center to AWS. Direct Connect provides a private, high-bandwidth connection that bypasses the public internet, resulting in more consistent network performance and lower latency. This is ideal for applications requiring stable and high-throughput network connections.
B. AWS Direct Connect - 在您的本地数据中心或托管设施与 AWS 之间建立专用、私有的连接。

AWS Direct Connect 可建立从您的本地环境到 AWS 的专用网络连接，与基于互联网的连接相比，它可以降 低网络成本、提高带宽吞吐量并提供更稳定的网络体验¹。Amazon CloudFront 是一种内容分发网络 (CDN) 服务，可 加速向用户分发静态和动态 Web 内容，例如 .html、.css、.js 和图像文件。虽然它可以提高内容的交付速度和性能， 但它不提供专用网络连接，也无法满足对稳定带宽吞吐量和网络体验的需求。

Amazon WorkSpaces is a fully managed, secure Desktop-as-a-Service (DaaS) solution that provides virtual cloud desktops. With Amazon WorkSpaces, employees can access a managed workstation environment in the AWS Cloud from their personal devices, using either a web browser or a client application. Amazon WorkSpaces 是一款完全托管、安全的桌面即服务 (DaaS) 解决方案，提供虚拟云桌面。借助 Amazon WorkSpaces，员工可以使用个人设备，通过 Web 浏览器或客户端应用程序访问 AWS 云中托管的工作站环 境。这非常适合远程办公，因为它确保了对工作资源的安全访问。

comments: B. Amazon Athena - serverless interactive query service that allows you to use standard SQL to query data stored in Amazon S3.

>B. Amazon Athena is an interactive query service that makes it easy to analyze data directly in Amazon Simple Storage Service (Amazon S3) using standard SQL. cn_question: 一家公司在研究实验室运行 Amazon EC2 实例。这些实例每周运行 3 小时，且不能中断。 满足这些要求的最经济高效的实例购买方案是什么？

comments: ’ The most cost-effective instance purchasing option for this scenario is B. On-Demand Instances. Here s why: On-Demand Instances are ideal for workloads that run for short durations and cannot be interrupted. They provide the flexibility to pay for compute capacity by the hour or second, with no long-term commitments. Compute Savings Plans and Convertible Reserved Instances are more cost-effective for longer-term, consistent usage but require a commitment over a 1 or 3-year term. Spot Instances offer the lowest prices but can be interrupted by AWS with little notice, making them unsuitable for workloads that cannot be interrupted.
C. Convertible Reserved Instances
There is a 60% to 40% split between the answers. In such scenarios, does the Admin provide the correct response?
在这种情况下，最具成本效益的实例购买选项是 B. 按需实例。原因如下：按需实例非常适合运行时间短且不 能中断的工作负载。它们允许您按小时或秒灵活地为计算容量付费，无需长期承诺。计算节省计划和可转换预留实例更

cn_options.B: S3 标准-不频繁访问 (S3 标准-IA)

en_question: A company needs to use Amazon S3 to store audio files that are each 5 megabytes in size. The company will rarely access the files, but the company must be able to retrieve the files immediately. Which S3 storage class will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?
comments: Answer is B: Amazon S3 Glacier Flexible Retrieval is a storage class within Amazon S3 designed for archiving data that doesn't require immediate access (this rules out Glacier).
S3 Standard IA - Storage Cost: $0.0125 × 100 = $1.25/month S3 Glacier Flexible Retrieval: Storage Cost: $0.004 × 100 = $0.40/month
S3 Glacier Flexible Retrieval is significantly cheaper but has a longer retrieval time so B.
S3 Glacier 灵活检索的最短检索时间为 1 至 5 分钟，而 S3 标准 IA 可以在毫秒级内完成检索。要求是能够快 速访问，因此答案是 B。
答案是 B：Amazon S3 Glacier Flexible Retrieval 是 Amazon S3 中的一个存储类别，专为归档不需要立即 访问的数据而设计（这排除了 Glacier）。

cn_question: 公司的合规官想要审核 AWS 服务组织控制 (SOC) 报告。 合规官应该使用哪项 AWS 服务或功能来完成这项任务？
en_question: A company's compliance officer wants to review the AWS Service Organization Control (SOC) reports. Which AWS service or feature should the compliance officer use to complete this task?
comments: The answer is A. AWS Artifact. AWS Artifact is your go-to resource for on-demand access to AWS compliance reports, including SOC reports, PCI DSS attestations, and ISO certifications. It provides a central repository where you can download these documents for review. Here's why the other options are not the correct choice: * AWS Concierge Support & AWS Support: These are support channels for getting help with AWS services. While they might be able to point you to where the reports are located, they don't directly provide the reports themselves. Artifact is the self-service portal for this. * AWS Trusted Advisor: Trusted Advisor provides recommendations for optimizing your AWS environment for cost optimization, performance, security, and operational excellence. It doesn't provide compliance reports like SOC reports.
Answer is AWS Artifact
A. AWS Artifact

答案是 A. AWS Artifact。AWS Artifact 是您按需访问 AWS 合规性报告的首选资源，包括 SOC 报告、PCI DSS 认证和 ISO 认证。它提供了一个中央存储库，您可以从中下载这些文档进行查看。以下是其他选项不正确的原 因：* AWS Concierge Support 和 AWS Support：这些是获取 AWS 服务帮助的支持渠道。虽然他们可能可以告诉您 报告的位置，但他们并不直接提供报告本身。Artifact 是提供此类服务的自助服务门户。* AWS Trusted Advisor： Trusted Advisor 提供有关优化 AWS 环境的建议，以提升成本、性能、安全性和运营效率。它不提供合规性报告，例 如 SOC 报告。
答案是 AWS Artifact

en_question: A company is designing workloads in the AWS Cloud. The company wants the workloads to perform their intended function correctly and consistently throughout their lifecycle. Which pillar of the AWS Well-Architected Framework does this goal represent?
comments: ’ Reliability- ability of a workload to perform its intended function correctly and consistently when it s expected to. Operational excellence (OE) is a commitment to build software correctly while consistently delivering a great customer experience. The operational excellence pillar contains best practices for organizing your team, designing your workload, operating it at scale, and evolving it over time.The operational excellence pillar provides an overview of design principles, best practices, and questions Performance Efficiency, as a pillar of AWS Well-Architected Framework, focuses on the optimal utilization of cloud resources to deliver cost-effective and high-performing solutions
C. Reliability - consistency
C. Reliability
可靠性是指工作负载在预期时间正确且持续地执行其预期功能的能力。卓越运营 (OE) 致力于在始终如一地提 供卓越客户体验的同时，正确地构建软件。卓越运营支柱包含组织团队、设计工作负载、大规模运营以及随时间推移进 行演进的最佳实践。卓越运营支柱概述了设计原则、最佳实践和相关问题。性能效率作为 AWS 架构完善框架的支柱之 一，专注于优化利用云资源，以提供经济高效且高性能的解决方案。

cn_question: 用于临时提供联合安全凭证以访问 AWS 资源的 AWS 服务是什么？

cn_options.B: AWS 简单令牌服务 (AWS STS)

en_question: Which AWS service is used to temporarily provide federated security credentials to access AWS resources?
comments: The correct answer is: B. AWS Simple Token Service (AWS STS) AWS STS (Security Token Service) is used to provide temporary, limited-privilege security credentials for accessing AWS resources. These credentials are often used in federated scenarios, where users authenticate through an external identity provider (e.g., Active Directory, SAML, or social identity providers) and are granted temporary access to AWS resources. The other options are not designed for this purpose: A. Amazon GuardDuty: A threat detection service that monitors for malicious activity and unauthorized behavior. C. AWS Secrets Manager: Used to securely store and manage secrets such as database credentials, API keys, and other sensitive information. D. AWS Certificate Manager: Used to provision, manage, and deploy SSL/TLS certificates for use with AWS services.
Answer is B. since C. assists with using and storing of secrets with AWS services and applications
B. AWS Security Token Service (AWS STS)

正确答案是：B. AWS 简单令牌服务 (AWS STS)。AWS STS（安全令牌服务）用于提供访问 AWS 资源的临 时、受限权限的安全凭证。这些凭证通常用于联合身份验证场景，用户通过外部身份提供商（例如 Active Directory、 SAML 或社交身份提供商）进行身份验证，并获得对 AWS 资源的临时访问权限。其他选项并非为此目的而设计：A. Amazon GuardDuty：一种威胁检测服务，用于监控恶意活动和未经授权的行为。C. AWS Secrets Manager：用于安 全地存储和管理密钥，例如数据库凭证、API 密钥和其他敏感信息。D. AWS Certificate Manager：用于配置、管理和 部署 SSL/TLS 证书，以便与 AWS 服务一起使用。
答案是 B，因为 C 有助于在 AWS 服务和应用程序中使用和存储密钥。

cn_question: 一家公司想要追踪特定 AWS 环境中所有 Amazon EC2 实例的月度成本和使用情况。 哪项 AWS 服务或工具可以满足这些要求？
en_question: A company wants to track the monthly cost and usage of all Amazon EC2 instances in a specific AWS environment. Which AWS service or tool will meet these requirements?
comments: The correct answer is: B. AWS Budgets AWS Budgets allows you to track your monthly costs and usage for AWS services, including Amazon EC2 instances. You can set custom budgets to monitor your spending and usage, and receive alerts when you exceed or are forecasted to exceed your budgeted thresholds.

AWS Budgets gives you access to a number of filtering dimensions (i.e., AWS Service, Availability Zone, and Member Account), and allows you to create budgets that are tracked on a monthly, quarterly, or yearly cadence. Meanwhile, AWS Cost Anomaly Detection allows you to define the spend segments you want to evaluate, e.g. individual AWS services, member account, cost allocation tags, cost categories, and define your alert preferences
B. AWS Budgets
正确答案是：B. AWS Budgets。AWS Budgets 允许您跟踪 AWS 服务（包括 Amazon EC2 实例）的月度成 本和使用情况。您可以设置自定义预算来监控支出和使用情况，并在超出或预计超出预算阈值时收到警报。
AWS Budgets 提供多种筛选维度（例如 AWS 服务、可用区和成员账户），并允许您创建按月、季度或年度跟 踪的预算。同时，AWS Cost Anomaly Detection 允许您定义要评估的支出细分，例如单个 AWS 服务、成员账户、成 本分配标签、成本类别，并定义您的警报偏好。

en_question: A company is planning to migrate to the AWS Cloud. The company is conducting organizational transformation and wants to become more responsive to customer inquiries and feedback. Which task should the company perform to meet these requirements, according to the AWS Cloud Adoption Framework (AWS CAF)? (Choose two.)

en_options.A: Realign teams to focus on products and value streams.
en_options.B: Create new value propositions with new products and services.
en_options.C: Use agile methods to rapidly iterate and evolve.
en_options.D: Use a new data and analytics platform to create actionable insights.

comments: A Realign teams to focus on products and value streams: This helps ensure that teams are structured around delivering value to customers, making the organization more agile and customer-centric. C Use agile methods to rapidly iterate and evolve: Agile methodologies enable the company to quickly respond to customer feedback and continuously improve their products and services¹². (1) AWS Cloud Adoption Framework (AWS CAF) - aws.amazon.com. https://aws.amazon.com/cloud-adoptionframework/. (2) What is a Cloud Adoption Framework? - CAF Explained - AWS. https://aws.amazon.com/what-is/cloudadoption-framework/. (3) An Overview of the AWS Cloud Adoption Framework.
B. is about the business side of things, so answers are A. and C. as agile is about rapid releases of software for customer feedback.
A. Realign teams to focus on products and value streams. C. Use agile methods to rapidly iterate and evolve.

A. 重新调整团队，使其专注于产品和价值流：这有助于确保团队围绕为客户创造价值而构建，从而使组织更 加敏捷且以客户为中心。C. 使用敏捷方法快速迭代和演进：敏捷方法使公司能够快速响应客户反馈，并持续改进其产 品和服务¹²。(1) AWS 云采用框架 (AWS CAF) - aws.amazon.com。https://aws.amazon.com/cloud-adoptionframework/。(2) 什么是云采用框架？- CAF 详解 - AWS。https://aws.amazon.com/what-is/cloud-adoptionframework/。(3) AWS 云采用框架概述。https://docs.aws.amazon.com/whitepapers/latest/overview-aws-cloudadoption-framework/welcome.html。
B. 指的是业务方面，所以答案是 A 和 C，因为敏捷开发是为了快速发布软件以获得客户反馈。

模建议。 AWS Compute Optimizer 是一项服务，它分析您的 AWS 资源的配置和利用率指标，为您提供合适的资源规

AWS Compute Optimizer 是一项服务，它会分析您的 AWS 资源配置和利用率指标，并为您提供资源优化建 议。它会报告您的资源是否处于最佳状态，并生成优化建议，以降低成本并提升工作负载的性能。Compute Optimizer 还提供图表，显示近期利用率指标的历史数据以及针对不同优化建议的预计利用率，您可以利用这些数据来评估哪项建 议能够提供最佳的性价比。通过分析和可视化您的使用模式，您可以决定何时迁移或调整正在运行的资源，同时仍能满 足您的性能和容量需求。

Athena is serverless and allows you to use SQL directly on S3 data without needing to set up complex infrastructure, which makes it ideal for interactive analysis and data exploration.
Amazon Athena 是一项交互式查询服务，可让您使用标准 SQL 轻松分析 Amazon S3 中的数据。
B. Amazon Athena - 一项交互式查询服务，允许您使用标准 SQL 查询分析存储在 Amazon S3 中的数据。

cn_question: 一家公司需要在亚马逊 EC2 实例上不间断地运行一个应用程序。 哪种 EC2 实例购买方案能够以最具成本效益的方式满足这一需求？
en_question: A company needs to run an application on Amazon EC2 instances without interruption. Which EC2 instance purchasing option will meet this requirement MOST cost-effectively?
comments: There is no time specified, so you cannot assume that the application will have to run for a year, which makes an on-demand more logical. • On-demand: Like a resort where you come and pay full price whenever you like. • Reserved: You plan ahead and commit to staying for one to three years, receiving a discount. • Savings plan: You commit to spending a specific amount monthly, allowing flexibility in room types. • Spot instances: Last-minute discounts for empty rooms, but you can be asked to leave if someone pays more. • Dedicated host: You book the entire resort building, having your own hardware. Capacity reservation: You book a room without certainty of staying, paying full price regardless.
Standard Reserved Instances
A. Standard Reserved Instances

由于没有具体时间限制，您不能假设应用程序必须运行一年，因此按需模式更为合理。• 按需模式：类似于度 假村，您可以随时入住并支付全价。• 预订模式：您提前计划并承诺入住一到三年，即可享受折扣。• 储蓄计划：您承 诺每月消费特定金额，并可灵活选择房型。• 空房模式：提供空房的最后一刻折扣，但如果有人支付更高的价格，您可 能会被要求离开。• 专属房东模式：您预订整个度假村建筑，并拥有自己的专属硬件。• 容量预订模式：您预订房间， 但无法确定是否入住，无论如何都需支付全价。 pgchand 两周零两天前 预留实例非常适合可预测、长期、稳定的工作负载。由于没有使用期限，因此按需实例是最佳选择。

It assists in understanding the on-premises environment and helps plan the migration to the AWS Cloud by collecting data about your existing infrastructure, applications, and dependencies.
C. AWS 应用程序发现服务 (AWS Application Discovery Service) AWS 应用程序发现服务可帮助您收集应 用程序组件的使用情况和配置数据。它通过收集有关现有基础设施、应用程序和依赖项的数据，帮助您了解本地环境并 规划向 AWS 云的迁移。

cn_question: 哪项设计原则与 AWS 架构完善框架的性能效率支柱相一致？
en_question: Which design principle aligns with performance efficiency pillar of the AWS Well-Architected Framework?
comments: I have personally asked a L6 in Amazon about this question. Here is his answer: Performance pillar is optimised for making sure things work perfectly irrespective of cost so B. ’ A is more about cost efficiency. Also serverless has some limitations like size of request has to be very small, max number of requests per second (throttling) - so balancing performance for cost- so A doesn t seem like it.

we are talking about performances: Performance Efficiency focuses on using IT and computing resources efficiently to meet system requirements, scaling to meet demand, and optimizing performance. Scaling horizontally (adding more instances or resources) is a key way to improve performance and handle increased load efficiently.
b. Scaling horizontally
我曾亲自就此问题咨询过亚马逊的一位 L6 级工程师。他的回答是：性能支柱旨在确保一切完美运行，而不考 虑成本，因此是 B。A 更侧重于成本效益。此外，无服务器架构也存在一些限制，例如请求大小必须非常小，每秒请求 数有限制（限速）——因此需要在性能和成本之间取得平衡——所以 A 似乎并不符合这一要求。
我们讨论的是性能：性能效率侧重于高效利用IT和计算资源来满足系统需求、根据需求进行扩展以及优化性 能。横向扩展（增加实例或资源）是提高性能和高效处理不断增长的负载的关键方法。

迟。 全球基础设施是 AWS 的关键特性，它通过将资源和服务放置在更靠近用户地理位置的位置，为用户提供低延

en_question: A company has multiple AWS accounts. The company needs to receive a consolidated bill from AWS and must centrally manage security and compliance. Which AWS service or feature should the company use to meet these requirements?
comments: Consolidated Billing Service Control Policies

comments: sub-millisecond

Amazon S3 Express One Zone is designed for high-performance, low-latency object storage. It provides single-digit millisecond access times, making it ideal for real-time applications, big data analytics, and machine learning workloads. ❌ B. S3 Standard – While S3 Standard is fast, it is not explicitly optimized for the lowest latency like S3 Express One Zone. ❌ C. S3 Glacier Flexible Retrieval – Designed for archival storage, takes minutes to hours to retrieve data. ❌ D. S3 Glacier Instant Retrieval – Provides millisecond access but is optimized for archival workloads, not high-performance storage.

Amazon S3 Express One Zone 专为高性能、低延迟对象存储而设计。它提供个位数毫秒级的访问速度，使 其成为实时应用程序、大数据分析和机器学习工作负载的理想之选。❌ B. S3 Standard – 虽然 S3 Standard 速度很 快，但它不像 S3 Express One Zone 那样专门针对最低延迟进行了优化。❌ C. S3 Glacier Flexible Retrieval – 专为 归档存储而设计，检索数据需要几分钟到几小时。❌ D. S3 Glacier Instant Retrieval – 提供毫秒级访问速度，但针对 归档工作负载进行了优化，而非高性能存储。
一种高性能的单可用区存储类，专为最常访问的数据和对延迟敏感的应用程序提供一致的个位数毫秒级数据访问而构 建。
“Amazon S3 Express One Zone 是一种高性能的单可用区存储类别，专为满足您最频繁访问的数据和对延迟 敏感的应用程序的需求而构建，可提供始终如一的个位数毫秒级数据访问速度。”

It allows you to run AWS infrastructure in your own data center while still managing it like you would in the cloud. So, you get the benefits of AWS services, but the hardware stays at your location.
D. AWS Outposts - 将 AWS 的基础设施扩展到本地环境。
当企业想要使用 AWS 云服务，但出于合规性、低延迟要求或其他原因必须将部分工作负载或数据保留在本地 时，AWS Outposts 就派上了用场。它允许您在自己的数据中心运行 AWS 基础设施，同时还能像在云端一样进行管 理。因此，您可以享受 AWS 服务的优势，而硬件则保留在您自己的本地。

cn_question: 一家公司希望连接其受支持的 AWS 服务和 VPC。该公司不希望将其内部流量暴露给公共互联网。 哪项 AWS 服务可以满足这些要求？
en_question: A company wants to connect its supported AWS services and VPCs. The company does not want to expose its internal traffic to the public internet. Which AWS service will meet these requirements?
comments: Secure private access to AWS services without using public IPs
AWS PrivateLink provides a private network connection between VPCs and AWS services
AWS PrivateLink (VPC Endpoint Services) • Most secure & scalable way to expose a service to 1000s of VPCs
无需使用公共 IP 地址即可安全私密地访问 AWS 服务
AWS PrivateLink 提供 VPC 和 AWS 服务之间的私有网络连接。

cn_question: 哪些AWS服务可以通过策略管理AWS资源的权限？
en_question: Which AWS service can manage permissions for AWS resources by using policies?
comments: AWS Identity and Access Management
C. AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM).
C. AWS 身份和访问管理 (IAM)。

cn_question: 一家公司需要在 AWS 云上运行部分工作负载，同时出于合规性原因，还需要将部分工作负载保留在公司自有的 数据中心。 哪项 AWS 服务能够满足这些要求？
en_question: A company needs to run some of its workload in the AWS Cloud. The company needs to keep some of the workload in its own on-site data center due to compliance reasons. Which AWS service will meet these requirements?
comments: Use AWS Outposts to run workloads locally while integrating with the AWS Cloud.

B. AWS Outposts. AWS Outposts extends AWS infrastructure, services, APIs, and tools to your on-premises data center. It enables you to run some of your workloads in the AWS Cloud while keeping others on-premises to meet compliance requirements.
使用 AWS Outposts 在本地运行工作负载，同时与 AWS 云集成。
B. AWS Outposts。AWS Outposts 将 AWS 基础设施、服务、API 和工具扩展到您的本地数据中心。它使您 能够在 AWS 云中运行部分工作负载，同时将其他工作负载保留在本地，以满足合规性要求。

cn_question: 一家公司想要部署一个将数据存储在关系数据库中的应用程序。该公司希望由 AWS 管理数据库任务，例如自动 备份和数据库快照。 哪项 AWS 服务可以满足这些要求？
en_question: A company wants to deploy an application that stores data in a relational database. The company wants database tasks, such as automated backups and database snapshots, to be managed by AWS. Which AWS service will meet these requirements?
comments: Relational Database Service
AWS RDS, Relational Database Service
Amazon EBS is a block storage service, not a managed database service.
AWS RDS，关系数据库服务
Amazon EBS 是一种块存储服务，而不是托管数据库服务。

cn_question: 一家运营本地服务器的公司决定开展一项新业务。该公司确定需要额外的服务器来处理新的工作负载。 云计算的哪项优势可以帮助该公司尽快配置额外的基础设施？

cn_options.A: 受益于巨大的规模经济
cn_options.C: 用固定费用换取可变费用

en_question: A company that operates on-premises servers decides to start a new line of business. The company determines that additional servers are required for the new workloads. Which advantage of cloud computing can help the company to provision additional infrastructure as quickly as possible?

en_options.A: Benefit from massive economies of scale
en_options.C: Trade fixed expense for variable expense

comments: as quickly as possible

B. Increase speed and agility. Cloud computing enables companies to provision infrastructure quickly and efficiently, allowing them to respond to new business demands faster. This is a key advantage when compared to traditional on-premises infrastructure, which can take much longer to set up.
B. 提升速度和敏捷性。云计算使企业能够快速高效地配置基础设施，从而更快地响应新的业务需求。与传统 的本地部署基础设施相比，这是一个关键优势，因为后者的部署可能需要更长的时间。
